translations.ご機嫌いかが？なんて、かしこまってみました: How's it going? Just trying to be formal.
translations.今日も元気にいこ？: Let's have a great day today!
translations.今日もマナカが一緒だよ？なんて: Guess who's here with you today? It's me, Manaka!
translations.午後も元気にいこー！: Let's keep our spirits up this afternoon!
translations.また明日もがんばろ？: Let's do our best again tomorrow?
translations.今日は早めにお風呂入っちゃおっと: I'm gonna take a bath early today.
translations.お休みだけど、早く起きるのもいいよね: It’s a day off, but waking up early can be nice too.
translations.今日の▲主人公＊▲の運勢はどうかな？わたしはいい感じなの: How’s your luck today, ▲主人公＊▲? I'm feeling good.
translations.遅刻しないように、時間にはゆとりをもってね: Make sure to leave early so you won’t be late!
translations.眠いときは、少し体を動かすといいよ？: If you're sleepy, moving around a bit helps, you know?
translations.なんだかポカポカしてて、また眠っちゃいそう: It's so cozy, I might fall asleep again.
translations.窓をあけたら、お花のいい香りがしてきたよ: I opened the window and the flowers smell amazing.
translations.気持ちよく汗をかくには、水分補給をしっかりね: Stay hydrated to enjoy sweating it out!
translations.昨日は寝苦しかったな、▲主人公＊▲は大丈夫だった？: Last night was rough for sleeping. You okay, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.眠りやすくなってきたから、うっかり眠りすぎちゃいそう: I'm getting sleepy again, might oversleep.
translations.もう寒くなってきたから、[22]には気をつけてね: It's getting cold, so be careful with [22]!
translations.こんなにも寒いときは、…ううん、なんでもないっ！: When it’s this cold… um, never mind!
translations.ぇ、好きだよ▼学校ではこんなこと、口に出して言えないもんね？: Aww, I like you▼ I can't really say stuff like this at school, right?
translations.23]たちが、カレシの話題で盛り上がってるの。わたしも参加しちゃおうかな、なんて: My friends are all chatting about their boyfriends. Should I join in?
translations.25]たちが、好きなアイドルの話してる。▲主人公＊▲もそういうの、好きなのかな: They're talking about their favorite idols. I wonder if you like that stuff too?
translations.25]たちが、理想のタイプの話で盛り上がってるみたい。▲主人公＊▲も、そういうの: Looks like they're chatting about their ideal types. You into that kind of thing?
translations.ねぇ、授業中にマンガ読んでる人がいる。[26,2]に見つかっちゃわないかな: Hey, someone’s reading manga during class. Hope they don’t get caught by [26,2].
translations.授業中にメールするのってドキドキしちゃう。ほんとはいけないよね: Texting during class is kinda thrilling, but I know I shouldn’t.
translations.午前中の授業って特に集中できるよね。でも▲主人公＊▲にメールしてたら説得力ないか: Morning classes are especially easy to focus in, but texting you might ruin that.
translations.新しいノートに書くのって気持ちいいよね: Writing in a new notebook feels so nice, doesn’t it?
translations.復習だけでもしておくの、おすすめだよ: I recommend at least reviewing a bit.
translations.犯人はあなたです！なんて。急でビックリした？: You’re the culprit! Surprised by that sudden twist?
translations.お勉強がんばれば、その分放課後が楽しくなるよ。: If you study hard, your after-school time will be way more fun.
translations.今日はあったかくて気持ちいいね。学校抜け出して遊びに行きたいぐらい、なんて: It’s so warm and nice today. I kinda wanna skip school and go have fun.
translations.今、ぼーっとしちゃってた。いけないいけない、集中しなくちゃ、ね？: I was just zoning out. Gotta focus, right?
translations.これだけ[19]と、外で思いっきり汗かくのも気持ちいいかも？: With this weather, sweating it out outside might feel great, huh?
translations.みんな朝からグッタリしてる。[19]もんね: Everyone looks so drained this morning. It’s rough, right?
translations.もうお腹空いてきちゃった。でもこれ、食欲の[24]のせいだからね？: I’m getting hungry already. But that’s just the hunger of [24], okay?
translations.[24]って、一番お勉強がはかどる季節だと思わない？: Don’t you think [24] is the best season for studying?
translations.今日も[19]ね、うう、お勉強に集中できるかな: It’s [19] again today. Ugh, hope I can focus on studying.
translations.[22]が流行ってるね。▲主人公＊▲も[22]には気を付けてね？: [22] is trending. You should be careful about [22], okay?
translations.▲主人公＊▲が隣の席なら、教科書忘れましたって、さりげなく近寄れるのにな。なんて: If you were sitting next to me, I could casually lean over and say I forgot my textbook.
translations.今ね、あてられた問題解いたら[26,2]に褒められちゃった。▲主人公＊▲にも褒め: I just solved a problem and got praised by [26,2]. I want you to praise me too!
translations.こっちの教室、居眠りしてる人がたくさんいるの。そろそろ[26,2]が起こす頃かな: There are a lot of people dozing off in my class. I think [26,2] will wake them up soon.
translations.今はのんびり……。午後もこんな感じかな: Just taking it easy right now... I wonder if the afternoon will be like this too.
translations.次の授業はマラソン。教室からわたしのこと見えるかな？: Next class is marathon. Do you think you can see me from the classroom?
translations.ふぅ、ほんのちょっと息抜き。▲主人公＊▲は何してる？: Just taking a quick breather. What are you up to?
translations.さっきの授業の公式、ちょっと難しかったな。帰ってから復習、復習: That formula from the last class was a bit tricky. Gonna review it when I get home.
translations.教室でカレシと仲良さそうにしてる子がいる。うらやましくなんて、ないよ？: There's a girl in class looking cozy with her boyfriend. Not jealous or anything!
translations.今日は家に帰ったらお菓子作ろうかな。お腹空いたからじゃ、ないよ？: Thinking about making some snacks when I get home. Not just because I'm hungry or anything!
translations.女の子同士で手紙のやり取りをしてるんだけど、▲主人公＊▲も欲しい？: We're passing letters around among the girls. Do you want one too?
translations.さっき廊下で▲主人公＊▲のこと、見てたんだけど、気づいた？: I was watching you in the hallway earlier. Did you notice?
translations.今日、通学のとき、道路にタンポポが咲いてたのを見かけたんだけど、応援したくなっち: I saw some dandelions blooming on my way to school today. Made me want to cheer them on!
translations.やっぱり教室にはクーラーが欲しいよね。[26,2]にお願いしてみようかな: I really wish we had air conditioning in the classroom. Should I ask [26,2]?
translations.水道の水がお湯になってる。太陽ってすごいね: The tap water's warm. The sun's amazing, huh?
translations.窓の外に枯葉が舞ってる、あの葉っぱでおイモ焼いたら美味しいかな？: The dried leaves are dancing outside the window. I wonder if they’d taste good roasted?
translations.恋愛小説を買ってみました。本当は推理小説が良かったんだけど、こういうのもいいよね: I bought a romance novel. I actually wanted a mystery novel, but this one’s nice too.
translations.教室にストーブがあるのはいいけど、休み時間には換気もしないとね。そっちの教室は大: Having a heater in class is nice, but we need to ventilate during breaks. Is your class okay?
translations.今日も寒そう。練習のとき大変かな: Looks cold today. Hope practice isn't too tough.
translations.今日はちょっと眠たいな。昨日の夜▲主人公＊▲のこと考えてたから: I'm a bit sleepy today. I was thinking about you last night, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.わたしが今日起きて、一番最初に何したかわかる？このメール送ったんだよ: Guess what the first thing I did when I woke up today was? I sent you this message!
translations.気持ちがいい朝だね、いいことがありそうだよ？: It's such a nice morning, feels like something good's gonna happen, right?
translations.二度寝なんかしちゃダメだよ？: Don't even think about going back to sleep, okay?
translations.ご飯食べてきた？お勉強がはかどるよ。集中、集中: Have you eaten yet? It'll help you focus on studying. Concentrate, concentrate!
translations.育って好き？わたしは部活以外で体を動かすのも楽しくて好きだな: Do you like exercising? I enjoy being active outside of club activities too.
translations.日は体育の授業があるから、気合入れちゃおっと: I have PE class today, so I’m getting pumped for it!
translations.ゃんと朝ご飯食べないと、４時間目でお腹が鳴らないかドキドキしちゃうね: If I don't eat breakfast, I'll be nervous my stomach will growl in 4th period.
translations.23]に、ファッション雑誌見せてもらったの。やっぱりお勉強しなくちゃね？: I checked out a fashion magazine with [23]. I really need to study, right?
translations.23]にスキンケア教えてもらっちゃった。▲主人公＊▲も、教えてほしい？: I learned some skincare tips from [23]. Do you want me to share them with you, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.日はなんだか、お勉強がはかどるなぁ。昨日良く眠れたからかな？: Today feels like a good day for studying. Maybe because I slept well last night?
translations.んだかみんなソワソワしてる。[24]だもんね。しかたないよね。: Everyone seems a bit restless. It's [24], so I guess that's normal.
translations.がムズムズする。[22]かな？それとも▲主人公＊▲が噂してるのかな？: I'm feeling a bit fidgety. Is it because of [22]? Or are you talking about me, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.室で[25]がシャツ脱いじゃった。恥ずかしいなぁ: In class, [25] took off their shirt. So embarrassing!
translations.日は家に帰ったらすぐシャワー浴びよ。▲主人公＊▲も汗かいたままにしちゃダメだよ？: When I get home today, I'm jumping in the shower right away. You shouldn't stay sweaty either, ▲主人公＊▲!
translations.術の[24]だし、美術の授業がんばっちゃお？: Since it's [24] for the arts, let's do our best in art class!
translations.欲の[24]だし、家庭科の授業でお菓子作りたいな: Since it's [24] for home economics, I want to make some sweets.
translations.室でもコート脱がない人が結構いるみたい。寒いもんね: Looks like a lot of people aren't taking off their coats in class. It's cold!
translations.日の体育はマラソンだよ。怪我しないように、ちゃんと準備運動しないとね: Today in PE, we have a marathon. I need to warm up properly to avoid injuries.
translations.今のうちに宿題終わらせれば、放課後は▲主人公＊▲と遊べる、かな: If I finish my homework now, I can hang out with ▲主人公＊▲ after school, right?
translations.休み時間にメールばかりしてたら、ヘンかな。▲主人公＊▲に送ってるの、わかっちゃう: Is it weird if I keep texting during break? I wonder if ▲主人公＊▲ notices.
translations.休み時間になると、男の子って元気になるよね。▲主人公＊▲もかな？: Boys get so lively during break, huh? Is that true for you too, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.授業のノート、取り逃しちゃった。今度見せてね？: I missed some notes in class. Can you show me next time?
translations.やってるテレビにウサギさんが出てる。カワイイ▼: There's a cute bunny on the show I'm watching! ▼
translations.っとピアノ弾いてたらママに怒られちゃった。つい時間忘れちゃったの、ご近所迷惑だよ: I got in trouble with Mom for playing the piano. I lost track of time, sorry for bothering the neighbors.
translations.パパがいないから、ママと二人でご飯食べながらテレビ観ちゃった。お行儀悪いけど、ド: Since Dad's not home, Mom and I had dinner while watching TV. Not very polite, but it was exciting and fun♪
translations.パとママと３人でクイズ番組観てるんだけど、わたしが一番成績がよかったんだよ？ふふ: We're watching a quiz show with Dad and Mom, and I got the best score! Hehe, Dad's kinda jealous.
translations.24]のお料理って、なにが思い付く？季節のお料理、作ってみたいな: What dishes come to mind for 24]? I wanna try making seasonal food!
translations.日テレビでやってたテニスの試合、観た？すごかったね、わたしも練習しなきゃ！: Did you see the tennis match on TV? It was amazing! I need to practice too!
translations.休みの日に家でお勉強するのって、おかしいのかな？: Is it weird to study at home on my day off?
translations.日は患者さんのお孫さんが家に遊びに来たから、お医者さんごっこしたよ。▲主人公＊▲: The other day, a patient’s grandkid came over, and we played doctor. Want to try it too, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.24]だからって、寝坊しちゃダメだよ？: Just because it's 24], don't sleep in, okay?
translations.ったかくなったけど、窓開けて寝ちゃダメだよ？: It's getting chilly, so don’t sleep with the window open, alright?
translations.いからってあっさりしたものばかり食べてると、体によくないからね。気を付けて: Eating too many light foods isn’t good for you, so be careful.
translations.近、[22]の患者さんが増えてるから、▲主人公＊▲も気をつけてね: Recently, there’s been an increase in patients at [22], so take care, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.う寒くなってきたから、風邪には気を付けてね: It's getting colder, so watch out for colds!
translations.欲の秋だね、食べすぎないようにしなきゃ。でも、たまには、ね？: It's the season of cravings! I need to be careful not to overeat. But sometimes, it’s okay, right?
translations.のところ、[22]の患者さんが増えてきてるみたい。手洗いうがいは、しっかりね？: It seems like there’s been an increase in patients at [22]. Make sure to wash your hands and gargle!
translations.24]は、街のイルミネーションがきれいだよー。わたしもいつか見に行きたいな: The city’s illuminations are beautiful in 24]. I wanna see them someday!
translations.マったらね、よく▲主人公＊▲のこと聞いてくるの。恥ずかしくて、全部は話せないよね: So, you know, they keep asking about you. It's kinda embarrassing, can't share everything.
translations.主人公＊▲に会いたいな。ねぇ、▲主人公＊▲はわたしに会いたくない？: I wanna see you! Hey, don't you wanna see me too?
translations.のね、昨日パパが書斎でお勉強してる隙にこっそりバラエティ番組観ちゃった♪: So, yesterday while Dad was studying in his office, I secretly watched a variety show♪
translations.今日のお夕飯は、わたしが作るの。腕によりをかけてがんばっちゃう: I’m making dinner tonight! Gonna put my heart into it.
translations.おっ洗濯ー♪おっせんたくー♪なんて: Oh, laundry time♪ Doing the laundry♪
translations.お菓子焼いたんだけど、作りすぎちゃった。▲主人公＊▲食べてくれる？なんて: I baked some snacks, but I made too much. Will you eat some, please?
translations.ママはなんでもできてすごいな、わたしも追いつかなくっちゃ: Mom can do everything, she's amazing. I gotta catch up!
translations.ママと一緒に庭のお手入れ。毎日お水をあげてたお花につぼみが出来たの。嬉しいな: Helping Mom in the garden. The flowers we watered every day are starting to bud. So happy!
translations.これから家のお掃除するの。▲主人公＊▲のお部屋はちゃんとキレイにしてる？: I’m gonna clean the house now. Is your room nice and tidy?
translations.良く晴れたときに、パーっとお洗濯物を干せると気持ちいいよね。雨の時は、お部屋がモ: On a sunny day, it feels great to hang out the laundry. But when it rains, the room gets all stuffy.
translations.[24]は、スミレのお花がきれいなの。お庭のスミレもそろそろ咲きだしてるよ: The violets are beautiful in [24]. The ones in our garden are starting to bloom too.
translations.お菓子作り、失敗しちゃった。[24]の陽気のせい？気をつけなくちゃ: I messed up baking. Is it because of the weather in [24]? I gotta be careful.
translations.お庭のお池にスイレンが咲いたよ。ぷっくりしていて可愛らしいの: The water lilies bloomed in the garden pond. They look so cute and plump!
translations.お庭にヒマワリが咲きました。まーっすぐ何を見つめてるんだろう、ね？: Sunflowers bloomed in the garden. I wonder what they're staring at?
translations.[24]は、やっぱりコスモスがきれいだなぁ。お庭いっぱいに咲かせる計画中だよ: The cosmos in [24] are really pretty. I’m planning to fill the garden with them!
translations.食べ物がおいしい季節だね。今日は何を作ろうかな: It’s the season for delicious food. What should I make today?
translations.ケーキを作ってみたよ。雪をイメージしてマシュマロ乗せてみたけど、食べにくい…かも: I tried making a cake. I put marshmallows on it to look like snow, but it might be hard to eat...
translations.何か創作レシピに挑戦したいな、良いアイデアがあったら教えてね、一緒につくろ？: I wanna try a creative recipe. If you have any good ideas, let me know and let’s make it together!
translations.起きるのが少しつらくなってきたね。: Getting up's getting a bit tough, huh?
translations.きてすぐ暖房つけちゃった。: I turned on the heater as soon as you got here.
translations.日もがんばろ？: You ready to tackle the day?
translations.もう、メール遅いぞ[32]: Come on, you're late with your texts!
translations.日も一日お疲れ様でした。: Thanks for today, you worked hard.
translations.日は夢、見られるかな。: I wonder if I can dream tonight.
translations.まり夜更かししないでね。: Don't stay up too late, okay?
translations.日はお布団減らしちゃお。: I think I'm gonna snuggle in more.
translations.23,3]のみんなから、▲主人公＊▲とのこと色々聞かれちゃった。みんなそういう話: Everyone's been asking about you, ▲主人公＊▲. They love that kind of gossip!
translations.日の練習はキツくって、みんな大変そう: Practice is tough, and everyone seems to be struggling.
translations.23,3]のみんなが、自分たちのカレシの話してる。わたしが混ざるのは、ちょっと恥: Everyone's talking about their boyfriends. I feel a bit shy about joining in.
translations.はよう[32]ステキな朝ね。: Good morning! It's such a lovely morning.
translations.れ物しないようにね？: Make sure to take care of yourself, okay?
translations.]からのモーニングメールだよ♪: Just sending you a morning message♪
translations.たしはこれから朝のティータイムだよ♪: I'm about to enjoy my morning tea♪
translations.主人公＊▲がメールくれたから、今日はいい日になりそう: You texted me, so I think today will be great!
translations.休みだからって、お昼寝ばかりしてちゃダメだよ？: Just because it's a day off doesn't mean you should nap all day, okay?
translations.う何するか決めた？: Have you decided what to do?
translations.朝はトーストにしよっかな。: I think I'll have toast for breakfast.
translations.で小鳥さんの歌声が聴こえるよ。: I can hear the little birds singing.
translations.の季節は目覚めがとっても気持ちいいの。: Waking up in this season feels really nice.
translations.くても▲主人公＊▲は元気だね♪: Even if it's chilly, ▲主人公＊▲ is full of energy♪
translations.ャワーあびてこよっと♪: I'm gonna hop in the shower♪
translations.今日もママのお手伝い。パパとママ、褒めてくれるかな？でも▲主人公＊▲に、いい子い: Helping Mom again today. I wonder if Dad and Mom will praise me? But honestly, I'd be happier if ▲主人公＊▲ gave me some praise.
translations.今日のお夕飯、わたしが作ったんだけど、とっても美味しくできたの。▲主人公＊▲もカ: I made dinner tonight, and it turned out really tasty! ▲主人公＊▲ would like a girlfriend who's good at cooking, right?
translations.今日のお夕飯、わたしが作ったんだけど……失敗しちゃった。パパとママは美味しいって: I made dinner tonight, but... it didn't go well. Mom and Dad said it was good, but I think they were just being nice...
translations.今日はわたしがお掃除当番。いつもがんばってるママを助けないとね: It's my turn to clean today. I have to help Mom who's always working hard.
translations.マナカは今日も▲主人公＊▲のおかげで幸せでした。なんて♪: Thanks to ▲主人公＊▲, I'm happy today too! ♪
translations.夜も……▲主人公＊▲がそばにいてくれたらいいのにな: I wish ▲主人公＊▲ could be here with me tonight.
translations.今日ね、星が良く見えるよ？それだけ、▲主人公＊▲に伝えたかったの: Hey, the stars are really nice tonight. Just wanted to share that with ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.今日もわたしの一日は▲主人公＊▲とのメールで終わり: Another day ends with a message from ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.▲主人公＊▲もあんまり夜更かししないでね？: Make sure you don't stay up too late, okay? ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.宿題が難しくて、こんな時間になっちゃった。▲主人公＊▲は大丈夫だった？: Homework's tough, and now it's this late. Are you doing okay, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.わたしもうね、半分眠っちゃってるみたい……: I feel like I'm already half asleep...
translations.あったかくなったけど、窓開けて寝ちゃダメだよ？: It's warm now, but don't sleep with the window open, okay?
translations.[24]のお布団って気持ちよくなっちゃうよね: The blankets feel so nice, don't they?
translations.寝苦しい季節だけど、体は冷やさないようにね？: It's a tough season for sleeping, but make sure you keep warm, okay?
translations.今日は暑いね、寝汗かいちゃうかな……: It's hot today; I might sweat while sleeping...
translations.この季節、虫の鳴き声を聞いてるとすぐ眠れちゃうの: In this season, I can fall asleep right away listening to the bugs.
translations.秋の夜長っていうけど、わたしには満喫できないかも: They say autumn nights are long, but I might not be able to enjoy them.
translations.寒いから、あまり夜更かしすると風邪ひいちゃうよ: It's cold, so don't stay up too late or you'll catch a cold.
translations.あったかくして、早めに寝てね？: Stay warm and get to bed early, okay?
translations.▲主人公＊▲は今何考えてるのかな……。正解したらご褒美くれる？なんて: I wonder what you're thinking about right now... If I guess right, do I get a reward? Just kidding!
translations.毎日一生懸命だと疲れるけど……それも楽しいね。一番は、▲主人公＊▲がいてくれるお: It can be tiring to work hard every day, but it’s fun too. Mostly 'cause you’re here with me.
translations.主人公＊▲とダブルスしたいな。わたしの方は、いつでも準備できてるからね: I wanna play doubles with you. I’m ready whenever you are!
translations.主人公＊▲が練習のお相手してくれるの、うれしいの: I’m so happy you’re practicing with me.
translations.日の練習は大変だったから、ぐっすり眠れそうだよ: Today’s practice was tough, but I think I’ll sleep really well.
translations.っぱり男子の球を打ち返すのは難しい。わたし、もっとカウンターの練習した方がいいか: Hitting back the boys' balls is so hard. Should I practice my counters more?
translations.主人公＊▲は、どのくらいの強さでガット張ってる？わたしは硬いほうが好きかな: What tension do you string your racket at? I think I like it a bit stiffer.
translations.習の後のシャワーは気持ちいいから、自主練しちゃいました♪: The shower after practice feels amazing, so I did some extra training♪
translations.ろそろガット張り替えないとなぁ。▲主人公＊▲のラケットは大丈夫？: I should probably restring my racket soon. Is yours okay?
translations.パとママに、新しいラケット買ってもらっちゃった♪お手伝いがんばろ？: My dad and mom got me a new racket♪ I’ll work hard to help out, right?
translations.習中に居眠りしてた１年生がいたの。[24]だからって、よく立ったまま寝られるよね: There was a first-year who dozed off during practice. I mean, how can you sleep standing up?
translations.ーブに失敗して、花壇にボール入れちゃった……お花、大丈夫だったかな: I messed up my serve and hit a ball into the flowerbed... I hope the flowers are okay.
translations.日練習中に倒れちゃった子、大丈夫かな？わたしたちも体調管理しっかりね？: I hope the kid who fell during practice is alright. We need to take care of ourselves too, okay?
translations.日は暑かったけど、スポーツ飲料飲んで気持ちよく汗かいちゃった。▲主人公＊▲にもあ: It was hot today, but I felt great sweating it out with my sports drink. Want some?
translations.の季節、練習の後はすごくお腹空いちゃう。今日も食べすぎちゃうかも♪: After practice in this season, I get super hungry. I might eat too much today♪
translations.って、練習には一番いい季節かもしれないね: This might be the best season for practice.
translations.ケット握る手がかじかんじゃうね。はぁーはぁー: My hands are freezing holding the racket. Hah, hah.
translations.習で汗かいたらちゃんとタオルで拭かなきゃ、だよ？拭いてほしい？なんて: After practice, I have to wipe off my sweat with a towel, okay? Want me to wipe you down? Just kidding!
translations.習のあとは、マッサージしてほしいな、なんて: I’d love a massage after practice, just saying.
translations.今夜は▲主人公＊▲の夢にお邪魔できないかな？なんて: I wonder if I can sneak into your dreams tonight? Just a thought.
translations.おやすみのキスしちゃう、ほんとは直接あげたいんだけどな。チュ▼: Goodnight kiss! I wish I could give you one in person. Muah▼
translations.たくさん練習するとご飯も美味しいし、お風呂も気持ちいいし、ぐっすり眠れるよね: Practicing a lot makes food taste better, baths feel nice, and helps you sleep well, right?
translations.今日もたくさんがんばった？そんなところも、大好きよ？明日は一緒にがんばりたいな？: Did you work hard today? I love that about you! Let’s tackle tomorrow together, okay?
translations.なんだか今日は寝付けないの、こんなことあまりないんだけど: I can’t seem to fall asleep tonight, which is kinda rare for me.
translations.今日はね、まだ眠くないよ。まだしばらく起きてよっと、ふふ♪: I’m not sleepy yet! I think I’ll stay up a bit longer, hehe♪
translations.まだ起きてる？特に用事はないんだけど、メールしたくなっちゃった: Are you still awake? I don’t have anything special to say, just wanted to text you.
translations.今日は楽しい一日だった？明日からもがんばろうね: Did you have a fun day? Let’s keep it up tomorrow!
translations.珍しく遅くまで起きてたら、ママからもう寝なさいって言われちゃった。: I stayed up late for once, and Mom told me to go to bed.
translations.[24]だからって、寝坊しちゃダメだよ？▲主人公＊▲は、わたしを起こしてくれる王: But don’t oversleep, okay? You’re my prince who wakes me up, after all.
translations.▲主人公＊▲はまだ起きてるの？夢の中で待ってるね▼: Are you still awake? I’ll be waiting for you in my dreams▼
translations.毎日暑いけど、恋人なんだからぴったりくっついて寝たいな。なんて、ちょっと大胆？: It’s hot every day, but since we’re a couple, I wanna snuggle up while we sleep. Is that too bold?
translations.暑いからって、あまり薄着して寝ると風邪ひいちゃうからね？でも、風邪ひいちゃったら: Don’t sleep too lightly just because it’s hot, or you might catch a cold! But if you do, I’ll take care of you.
translations.恋愛小説を読んでたら遅くなっちゃった。続きは夢で▲主人公＊▲と……かな？: I got caught up reading a romance novel and lost track of time. Maybe I’ll continue it in my dreams with you...?
translations.たまにならお夜食もいいよね？本当は良くないんだけど……、ナイショね▼: Sometimes a late-night snack is okay, right? I know it’s not the best... but let’s keep it a secret▼
translations.毎日寒いよね。こんなときはカレシにあっためてもらいたいな。なんて: It’s so cold every day. I wish I could be warmed up by my boyfriend right now.
translations.▲主人公＊▲ー？マナカは寒くてふるえてますよー？ふふ♪: Hey, ▲主人公＊▲? I’m shivering from the cold over here! Hehe♪
translations.早く夜でもお互い会えるようになればいいのにね、なんて: I wish we could see each other at night soon, don’t you think?
translations.腹出して寝ちゃダメだよ？: Don't sleep with your belly out, okay?
translations.だ、セミの鳴き声がするけど……: I can hear the cicadas chirping, though...
translations.書してたら、もうこんな時間になっちゃった。: I got so caught up in writing, and now it's this late.
translations.虫の鳴き声いい感じ……: The sound of the bugs is nice...
translations.布団入ったら冷たい。けど……: The futon feels cold when I get in. But...
translations.業中にしょうがないなぁ、もう[32]: Can't help it during class, huh?
translations.の陽気に負けないでね。: Don't let the weather get you down.
translations.ついね？わたしはまだまだ大丈夫。: Just a little? I'm still doing fine.
translations.の暑さに負けないでね。: Don't let the heat get to you.
translations.芋のことなんて、考えてないよ？: You're not thinking about sweet potatoes, right?
translations.むいね？指が冷えちゃってペンが握れないよぅ。: It's so cold, I can't even hold my pen.
translations.の寒さに負けちゃダメなんだから。: You can't let the cold beat you.
translations.業に集中しなきゃなのに、▲主人公＊▲ったら[32]: I should be focused on studying, but I'm thinking about you.
translations.主人公＊▲とメールしたいって思ってたマナカも悪い子かも？: Maybe it's a little bad that Manaka wants to text you?
translations.っそりメールするのも楽しいね[32]: Sneaking in a text is kinda fun.
translations.生に見つからないようにね[32]: Just don't let anyone find out!
translations.風呂から上がったところ[32]: I just got out of the bath.
translations.、お風呂上りで……その……: I'm all fresh from the bath... um...
translations.風呂上り、だ・よ[32]: Just got out of the bath, you know?
translations.主人公＊▲はもうお風呂入ったのかな？: Have you taken a bath yet?
translations.主人公＊▲はお風呂これから？: You getting in the bath soon?
translations.活の疲れもシャワーでスッキリ♪: A shower will totally refresh you after that!
translations.っぱり部活のあとはシャワーだね[32]: After club activities, a shower's a must, right?
translations.主人公＊▲もお風呂でサッパリとね？: Hope you feel fresh after your bath too!
translations.主人公＊▲もお風呂でサッパリ出来た？: Did you feel refreshed after your bath?
translations.ベンダーの入浴剤の香りで、癒されちゃった♪: The scent of that bath bomb was so soothing!
translations.はどんな入浴剤にしよっか迷っちゃうなぁ。: I can't decide which bath bomb to use.
translations.日２度目の、お風呂ね[32]: It's my second bath of the day!
translations.いから、ちょっとからだを冷ましてます[32]: Just cooling off a bit now.
translations.浴中に本を読むのって、おかしいかな？: Is it weird to read a book in the bath?
translations.い、本を最後まで読んじゃった。: I ended up reading the whole book.
translations.冷めしないようにね。ちょこっと足にお水かけるといいよ？: Make sure it doesn't cool down! Just splash a little water on your legs.
translations.湯しちゃった。今日は早めに寝よっと。: I took my bath. Gonna hit the hay early tonight.
translations.りあえず、パジャマ着てきます[32]またね[32]: For now, I'm putting on my pajamas. Talk later!
translations.ろしければ、お背中流しましょうか？なんて[32]: If you want, I can wash your back? Just saying!
translations.たメールするね。: I'm in the middle of dinner right now.
translations.飯食べてました[32]: I'm having my meal right now.
translations.パに隠れてこっそりお返事メール。: Sneaking in a text while hiding from my dad.
translations.パにメールしていることバレませんように……: Hope he doesn't find out I'm texting...
translations.主人公＊▲はもうご飯食べたのかな: I wonder if ▲主人公＊▲ has eaten yet.
translations.食事中なのにメールなんて、お行儀悪くて、ごめんね。: Sorry for texting while you're eating.
translations.日のご飯は、わたしの自信作です[32]: Today's lunch is my special dish! 😊
translations.主人公＊▲も一緒にご飯食べたい？: Do you want to eat together, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.はお野菜が甘くておいしいよ♪: The veggies are sweet and delicious! 🎶
translations.は花火を見ながら、スイカを食べたいな。: I wanna eat watermelon while watching fireworks.
translations.後のアイス食べてるよ、ぱくり♪: I'm having ice cream later, yum! 🍦
translations.べ過ぎないように気をつけなきゃ。: Gotta be careful not to overdo it.
translations.いときに食べるアイスも、オススメだよ♪: Ice cream is a must during the hot season! 🎶
translations.日は[23]に誘われて、学食にいるの。: I'm at the cafeteria, invited by a friend.
translations.キドキしたけど、購買部にチャレンジしてみたの。焼きそばのパンが買えたよ♪: I was nervous, but I tried the shop. Got some yakisoba bread! 🎶
translations.さも忘れるくらい、集中出来ちゃった。: I got so focused, I almost forgot everything.
translations.夜食は、ほどほどに、だよ？: Don’t overdo it with the late-night snacks, okay?
translations.っぱり秋は、お勉強がはかどるなぁ。: Fall really makes studying so much easier.
translations.タツでぽかぽかしてると、眠くなっちゃいそう。: Sitting here all cozy makes me sleepy.
translations.ゃんちゃんこって古いかな？▲主人公＊▲には見せられないけど。結構好きなの。: Is the 'chan-chan' thing too old-fashioned? I can't show it to you, ▲主人公＊▲, but I kinda like it.
translations.主人公＊▲と一緒にお勉強したいな[32]: I really wanna study together with you, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.からないところがあったら、何でも聞いてね。: If you have any questions, just ask me, okay?
translations.ールうれしいな[32]: I’m so happy to hear from you!
translations.っというまに、こんな時間。: Before I know it, it’s this late.
translations.ールうれしいよ[32]: I’m really glad to hear from you!
translations.し、練習でおかしなところがあったら、教えてね。: If I mess up during practice, let me know, okay?
translations.主練しちゃおっかなって。: I might just practice a lot.
translations.振りだって、積み重ねが大事だよね。: With swings, it's all about building up, right?
translations.の子が、筋力トレーニングって幻滅しちゃう？: Do you get disappointed with strength training?
translations.も、その前にラケットのメンテナンスしよ。: But first, I need to take care of my racket.
translations.ゃんとお水飲むんだよ？: Make sure to drink water, okay?
translations.っぱい動くと、その分お腹が空いちゃうから、困っちゃう。: When I move a lot, it makes me super hungry.
translations.はいつもよりストレッチを長めにね。: Let's stretch a bit longer than usual.
translations.んな寒さで、あまりからだ動かない……かも？: With this cold, I might not move much...?
translations.習中でも、メールのお返事は書いちゃうの[32]: Even during practice, I’ll reply to your messages.
translations.習中も、わたしをもっと見てね[32]: During practice, keep an eye on me more!
translations.ー……調子よくないかも……: Uh... I might not be feeling great...
translations.ょっと良くない……かな？: I’m not feeling too good... maybe?
translations.ンを焼いてみました。お紅茶と一緒にね[32]: I tried baking some bread. Had it with tea! [32]
translations.パに見つかると怒られちゃうから、またあとでね。: I’ll get in trouble if my parents find out, so talk later.
translations.りあえず、ごちそうさましなきゃ。またね。: Anyway, I should say thanks. Talk soon.
translations.庭教師のマナカです[32]なんて。: Your tutor Manaka here! [32] Just kidding.
translations.日の予習もいいけど、メールもね。: Reviewing is good, but don’t forget to email me too.
translations.習も大切だからね。: Studying is important too, you know.
translations.休みでも、しっかりね。: Even on break, keep it up.
translations.回は宿題多くて大変。: This time, there’s a lot of homework. It’s tough.
translations.い、眠くなっちゃうけど、そんなときこそ集中、集中♪: I’m getting sleepy, but I need to focus, focus! ♪
translations.ぶのは宿題やってからだよ？: You can relax after you finish your homework, okay?
translations.たし、次の問題が解けたらアイスを食べるんだ♪: If I solve this next problem, I’m treating myself to ice cream! ♪
translations.うやく、今日の一日も終わりだね。: Looks like today’s coming to an end.
translations.日の終わりって、お休みの日だと、より寂しく感じるよね。: The end of the day feels lonelier on days off.
translations.と気づくと、テニスで頭がいっぱいなときってない？: Ever get so into tennis that it takes over your mind?
translations.まり関係ないかもしれないけど、わたしの作った料理食べて？なんて。: This might be random, but wanna try my cooking?
translations.し早く目がさめたから、今日は朝のお散歩。気持ちいいよ。: I woke up early, so I’m going for a morning walk. It feels nice.
translations.活中だよ[32]: I’m in the middle of something.
translations.れ？今は部活中だよ[32]: What? I’m in club activities right now.
translations.日の練習は、基礎練がメインみたい。: Today’s practice seems to focus on the basics.
translations.日の練習、ちょっと物足りないかも。: Today’s practice might be a bit lacking.
translations.主人公＊▲と、どこか行けばよかったかな、なんて[32]: I wonder if I should’ve gone somewhere with ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.くも悪くもないかな？なんて。: Not too bad, I guess? Just saying.
translations.んなときは、いつもと違うことして気分を変えよう、かな？: When that happens, maybe I should do something different to change my mood?
translations.ち込んでばかりじゃ、ダメよね。: I can't just keep feeling down.
translations.も、くよくよしてちゃ……ダメ。: If I keep worrying... that's no good.
translations.分転換にメール、かな？: Maybe I should email to clear my head?
translations.しいことをしなくちゃ、ね？: I need to do something fun, right?
translations.主人公＊▲と会えたら、元気になれそう？: If I could see you, ▲主人公＊▲, I think I'd feel better.
translations.まには、息抜きしないとね。: Sometimes, you just need a break.
translations.抜きしたいなー、なんて。: I kinda want to relax, you know?
translations.主人公＊▲とメールしてたら、もっと元気になれそう？なんて。: Talking to you makes me feel even better, you know?
translations.気なのは、▲主人公＊▲のおかげ、かな？: I think my good mood is thanks to ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.気の源は▲主人公＊▲……だよ。: You're my source of happiness, ▲主人公＊▲... for sure.
translations.ールありがとう。更に元気になっちゃった。: Thanks for the message! It's made me even happier.
translations.っと元気にしてほしいな、なんて。: I really want you to cheer me up.
translations.主人公＊▲からメールも貰えたし…[32]: I even got an email from you... [32]
translations.ナカの元気、わけてほしい？なんて[32]: Want some of my energy? Just asking!
translations.なら、何でも出来ちゃうかも[32]: Then I might be able to do anything!
translations.日もマナカは、▲主人公＊▲のおかげで元気いっぱい、なのでした[32]テヘ♪: Thanks to you, I'm feeling super energetic today! Hehe♪
translations.りがとう。うれしいな。: Thanks! That makes me so happy.
translations.っぱり、好きって言われると安心するね。: It really makes me feel secure when you say you love me.
translations.にどうしたの？でも嬉しいよ。: What’s up? But I’m really happy.
translations.も、まだ足りないよ。もっと、もっと言って。: But it’s still not enough. Say it more, please.
translations.たしもっと幸せになりたいな。: I want to be even happier.
translations.んなこと言われたら、ついつい▲主人公＊▲のこと考えちゃうよ。: If you say stuff like that, I can't help but think about you.
translations.きって言ったら何してくれる？なんて。: What will you do if I say 'K'? Just curious.
translations.う、恥ずかしいよ。でもすごく嬉しい。: Ugh, I'm so embarrassed. But it makes me really happy.
translations.だか恥ずかしいね。でもおかしくないよね？: It's kinda embarrassing, right? But it's not weird, is it?
translations.接言ってもらえた方が…ううん、やっぱり恥ずかしい。: It's nice to hear you say that... no, wait, it's still embarrassing.
translations.主人公＊▲と一緒で、とっても幸せだよ[32]: I'm so happy being with ▲主人公＊▲[32]
translations.▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼……この気持ち、書ききれないよ[32]: ▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼...I can't put this feeling into words[32]
translations.たしも……: I want to see you too...
translations.ナカも会いたい[32]: Naka wants to see you too[32]
translations.そんな気分じゃないの。: I'm just not in the mood.
translations.めんね。今、体調が良くないの。: Sorry. I'm not feeling well right now.
translations.晴らしになるかなぁ？: Will it help clear my head?
translations.うだね、時間が合えばいいけど。: I hope we can find a time that works.
translations.いたくない、なんて。ウソ。会いたい。: I don't wanna say I don't miss you. Just kidding. I really do.
translations.いたいって思ったときにすぐ会えるのが、恋人のいいところ、かな。: Being able to meet up when you want is one of the best things about being in love.
translations.は急げ？間に合わなくなってもしらないよ？なんて。: Hurry up? If you don't, I won't wait for you, you know? Just saying.
translations.からでも、なんて。: Even if it's just for a bit.
translations.主人公＊▲のことばっかり、考えてた……: I've been thinking about you, ▲主人公＊▲...
translations.主人公＊▲もマナカのことで、頭いっぱいなんだね、おんなじだ[32]: You’re thinking about me too, huh? We're so in sync.
translations.ぐ会えるよね[32]: We can meet up soon, right?
translations.のね、我慢できない[32]: I can't hold back any longer.
translations.ナカの隣は空いてますよー、なんて[32]: There's a spot next to Naka, just saying!
translations.ょっと失敗続きで、やになっちゃう。: I've been having a rough time, it's frustrating.
translations.たしにもわけて？: Can you share some with me?
translations.ょっとスランプなの。: I'm in a bit of a slump.
translations.の前ね、部長に負けちゃった。: I lost to the club president earlier.
translations.日はちょっと眠いの。シャキっとしないとね。: I'm a bit sleepy today. Gotta wake up!
translations.ては、かわいいウサギさんでも見つけたのかな？: Did you find a cute bunny or something?
translations.習試合に勝ったの？: Did you win a practice match?
translations.イスでも食べたの？: Did you eat at the cafe?
translations.たしもこの前ね、男子部の部長に勝てたの！: I actually beat the boys' club president the other day!
translations.たしもうれしくなってきちゃった。: I'm starting to feel happy too.
translations.近、サービスエースいっぱい決めちゃった、わたしも調子いいみたい。: I scored a bunch of service aces! I think I'm on a roll.
translations.たしも最近、気分がいいかも♪: I've been feeling pretty good lately too♪
translations.ナカも▲主人公＊▲と出会えてから、ずっとかもしれない[32]: Ever since I met ▲主人公＊▲, I've felt this way.
translations.んなことでメールするなんて、もう[32]: I can't believe I'm emailing about this.
translations.たしもかも……: I might be feeling the same way...
translations.気？わたしに出来ることある？: Is there something I can do for you?
translations.のままじゃいけないよね。: I can't just stay like this.
translations.主人公＊▲がそばに居てくれたら、安心なんだけどな。: I'd feel better if ▲主人公＊▲ was here with me.
translations.ち込まないように、気分変えよう？: Let's change our mood so we don't feel down.
translations.振りしてこようかな？: Should I try to cheer up?
translations.ろ向きにばかり考えちゃ、ダメよ？: Don't just focus on the negative!
translations.わてちゃダメだよ？: You can’t push yourself too hard, okay?
translations.りをよく見て行動、だからね？: Just pay attention to what you’re doing, alright?
translations.たしもがんばろっと♪: I’ll give it my all too♪
translations.んばってるんだね。すごいすごい。: You’re really working hard, huh? That’s amazing.
translations.主人公＊▲のがんばる姿、見たいな？: I wanna see you trying your best, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.らだはこわさないようにね、応援してるから。: Just don’t overdo it, I’m cheering for you.
translations.ガなんてしないでね、心配しちゃうよ。: Don’t do anything reckless, it worries me.
translations.も、そんなときでもメールくれるなんて、うれしいな。: I’m really happy you text me even when you’re busy.
translations.しいってことは、マナカと会える時間が少なくなっちゃう。: If you’re busy, it means less time to see me.
translations.も、またすぐ会えるって、マナカ待ってるね[32]: But we’ll see each other again soon, I’m waiting for you[32].
translations.も、マナカにメールしてくれて、ありがとう[32]: Thanks for texting me, I appreciate it[32].
translations.のぶん、マナカはヒマですよー。なんて[32]: I’m just chilling here, you know? Just saying[32].
translations.んなときはね、うーん。思いつかない。: Hmm, I can’t think of anything right now.
translations.主人公＊▲は宿題やった？: Did you finish your homework, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.らだを動かすといいよ？: Maybe try moving around a bit?
translations.たしは今ね、本を読んでるの。▲主人公＊▲も読みたい？: I’m reading a book right now. Want to read it too, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.散歩するとか？: How about going for a walk?
translations.振りをすると、気がまぎれるかも？: Doing some moves might help you feel better?
translations.ススメの本があるけど、一緒に読もっか？なんて。: I have a book I recommend. Want to read it together?
translations.科はちがうかもしれないけど、これから一緒に宿題する？: We might be in different subjects, but wanna do homework together?
translations.っとわたしにメールしても、いいよ？: You can always email me, you know?
translations.主人公＊▲に会えないからかも？: Maybe it’s because I can’t see you, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.ールありがとう。わたしがお相手してあげるね。: Thanks for the email! I’ll keep you company.
translations.主人公＊▲からメールもらったから、少し退屈じゃなくなりそうかな？: Since I got an email from you, I might not be so bored anymore.
translations.主人公＊▲からのメール待ってたの[32]: I was waiting for your email, ▲主人公＊▲[32]
translations.ふ、こういうの、少し恥ずかしいね[32]: Hehe, this is a bit embarrassing, huh?[32]
translations.っぱり、元気が一番だよね。: Being happy is the most important, right?
translations.しいことを、考えよう？: Let's think of something fun, okay?
translations.たしは、▲主人公＊▲のいいところ、いっぱい知ってるよ？: I know so many great things about you, ▲主人公＊▲!
translations.かあったらわたしに言ってね。: If you need anything, just tell me.
translations.っとそばに居れたらいいのにな。: I wish I could be right by your side.
translations.ジティブに、だよ？ネガティブなままじゃ前に進めないから、ね[32]: Stay positive, okay? Can't move forward if you're negative.
translations.ナカが、いい子いい子って、なぐさめてあげる[32]: Naka will comfort you, saying you're a good kid.
translations.に見えるものが全てじゃないよ？マナカがそばにいるよ[32]: What you see isn’t everything, you know? I'm here for you.
translations.を見て、ほら、マナカが見える？なんて[32]: Look, can you see me? Just saying...
translations.理しちゃダメだから、ね？: You can't push yourself too hard, alright?
translations.やめに休んで、疲れをとろう？: Take a break and rest up, okay?
translations.養のあるもの食べてね。: Make sure to eat something nutritious.
translations.れたら、休んでもいいんだよ？: If you need to, it’s totally fine to rest.
translations.理は、からだに良くないから、ね？: Pushing yourself isn’t good for you, you know?
translations.日もおつかれさま。: Thanks for your hard work today.
translations.日もいっぱい、がんばった？: Did you do your best today?
translations.っと精一杯がんばったんだよね。: You really gave it your all, huh?
translations.たし、応援してるからね。: Just know I'm cheering for you.
translations.たしが力になれることがあったら、言ってね。: If there's anything I can do to help, just let me know.
translations.れてるのにメールありがとう。そういうマメなところ、マナカは好きだよ[32]: Thanks for the message even though you're busy. I really like that about you, Manaka.
translations.んなときでも▲主人公＊▲はやさしいね。ゆっくり休んでね[32]: Even when things are tough, ▲主人公＊▲ is so kind. Take it easy, okay?
translations.ナカが癒してあげる[32]: I'll be here to heal you.
translations.ッサージしてあげよっか？なんて[32]: Want me to give you a massage? Just kidding!
translations.コラ！居眠りしちゃダメだぞ。ふふ: Hey! No dozing off, okay? Hehe.
translations.今日もはりきって、ね？: Let’s give it our all today, okay?
translations.今日もネネが一緒なのだ: Nene's here with you again today.
translations.午後もこのままの～んびりいこう？: Let’s just chill this afternoon, okay?
translations.明日もまたがんばろー！: Let’s do our best again tomorrow!
translations.今日は[19]なぁ: It's such a nice day today!
translations.休みだからって、お寝坊さんはダメよ？: Just because it's a day off, don't be a sleepyhead, okay?
translations.休みでも、昼まで寝てるなんて許さないからね？: Even on a break, I won't let you sleep till noon!
translations.休みの日なのに、いつも通り早く起きちゃうことってない？私はたまにあるんだよね: Don't you sometimes wake up early even on your days off? I do sometimes.
translations.ちゃんと時間通りに起きられた？: Did you manage to wake up on time?
translations.今朝はちゃんと起きられた？: Did you get up okay this morning?
translations.遅刻なんてしたら、私が許しませんからね？: If you're late, I won't forgive you, you know?
translations.寝ぼけた顔で外に出ちゃ、ダメよ？: You can't go outside looking all sleepy, okay?
translations.春は起きるの辛いね、がんばって起きて！: Spring mornings are tough, but you gotta get up!
translations.ねむいけど、がんばって起きる: I'm sleepy too, but I'll push through and get up.
translations.昨日も暑かったね。: It was hot yesterday, wasn't it?
translations.昨日はあんまり寝られなかったな。: I didn't get much sleep last night.
translations.▲主人公＊▲もいつまでも寝てたらダメよ？: You can't just sleep in all day, ▲主人公＊▲!
translations.いつまでも薄着で寝てると風邪ひいちゃうよ？: If you keep sleeping in light clothes, you'll catch a cold!
translations.布団から出るの辛いけど、早く支度しないと遅刻しちゃうからね？: It's hard to get out of bed, but I need to get ready or I'll be late!
translations.寒いけど、ちゃんとすぐ起きられたら褒めてあげるから。ね？: It's cold, but if you get up right away, I'll give you a compliment, okay?
translations.カノジョからのおはようメールってやっぱりうれしいのかな？私は▲主人公＊▲からもら: I wonder if a good morning text from a girlfriend makes you happy? I feel happy when I get one from you, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.ほんとは▲主人公＊▲のキスで目覚めたかったな▼: Honestly, I wanted to wake up to your kiss, ▼.
translations.今日は起きるの大変だったなぁ。▲主人公＊▲はどう？: Getting up today was tough. How about you, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.たまにど～しても起きられないことって、あるよね。でも、二度寝はダメよ？: Sometimes you just can't get up, right? But no snoozing!
translations.まには運動した方がいいのかな、って思うけど。難しいね、色々と。: I think I should exercise sometimes, but it’s tough, you know?
translations.主人公＊▲のクラスって、宿題多い？こっちは結構大変かも: Is there a lot of homework in your class, ▲主人公＊▲? It’s kinda rough over here.
translations.ね、窓の外に飛行機雲が出てるよ。そっちからも見える？: Hey, there’s a contrail outside the window. Can you see it from there?
translations.ね、ノートとるのは得意なんだけど、テストは思ったほどできないんだよね。どうしてだ: I’m good at taking notes, but I don’t do as well on tests. I wonder why.
translations.クラスの友達と一緒に雑誌読んでたの。「カレを誘惑する１０の小悪魔テクニック」だっ: I was reading a magazine with my friends. It had "10 Devilish Techniques to Seduce Your Boyfriend." Should I try some?
translations.まに口がさびしくなっちゃうの。学校じゃパクパクは食べにくいし、やっぱり飴持ってる: My mouth gets kinda lonely. It’s hard to snack at school, so having some candy is super handy!
translations.じクラスにカップルがいるんだけど、休み時間になると教室でイチャイチャし始めるの。: There’s a couple in my class who starts getting all lovey-dovey during breaks. Must be nice.
translations.ラスに寝ぐせ付いてる男の子がいる。▲主人公＊▲は大丈夫だよね？: There’s a boy in class with bedhead. You’re okay, right, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.んな季節は、授業を抜け出して屋上でお昼寝でもしたら気持ちいいかな。そんな悪いこと: This season makes me wanna sneak out of class and take a nap on the rooftop. Not that I’d actually do it.
translations.日は寝てる人多いなぁ。そっちも似たような感じかな: A lot of people seem sleepy today. Is it the same over there?
translations.ぁ、あつい。暑くても、男の子は気楽に服が脱げていいなぁ: Ugh, it’s hot. Boys can just casually take off their clothes, huh?
translations.つーい……デキシーズだったら常に空調きいてるけど、学校だとそうはいかないもんね。: It’s tough... If I were at Dexies, the AC would be on all the time, but not at school.
translations.の通学路って、好きだな。風景が素敵だし、気候も気持ちいいしね: I really like the route to school. The scenery is lovely and the weather feels nice.
translations.書の秋。▲主人公＊▲は何か読んでる？: It’s the season for reading. Are you reading anything, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.日は帰りも寒そうだね。急いで帰ろっと: It looks like it’ll be cold on the way home. Better hurry back.
translations.れだけ寒いと、デキシーズにもあまりお客さん来ないかな: If it’s this cold, not many customers will come to Dexies.
translations.主人公＊▲にメール打ってると、みんなよくのぞいてくるの。もちろん見せないよ？: When I’m texting you, everyone keeps peeking over. Don’t worry, I won’t show them!
translations.ういえば最近、友達からよく「前よりキレイになった」って言われるんだけど……▲主人: Speaking of which, my friends keep saying I look prettier lately... Is it because of you, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.ういえば最近、友達から「前より色っぽくなった」って言われるんだけど、ほんとかな: By the way, my friends say I’ve become more alluring recently. Is that really true?
translations.ラスの男の子たちが、下級生の女の子で誰が可愛いかって話してる。あの子たちは年下が: The boys in class are talking about which younger girls are cute. Do they like younger girls?
translations.午前中の授業って、私は好きかな。お昼は眠くなっちゃうもん: I kinda like morning classes. I get sleepy after lunch.
translations.抜き打ちの小テストで１００点取っちゃった♪: I aced the pop quiz with a 100! ♪
translations.危ない。携帯触ってたら、先生に見つかりそうになっちゃった: That was close! I almost got caught on my phone by the teacher.
translations.今日は新しいシャーペンなんだ♪: I’m using my new mechanical pencil today! ♪
translations.ふふ、ノートを新しくしてみました♪: Hehe, I got a new notebook! ♪
translations.自習になっちゃった。ヒマだなぁ: It turned into self-study time. So boring.
translations.勉強きちんとすれば、それだけ放課後が楽しくなるよ。: If I study properly, after-school will be way more fun.
translations.なんだか春って授業に身が入らないのよね。これってただの言い訳かな: I just can't focus in class during spring. Is that just an excuse?
translations.眠いなぁ。春のせいにしちゃお: I'm so sleepy. Blaming it on spring!
translations.暑い日こそ、だらけずにシャキっとしよ？: On hot days, let’s not slack off and stay sharp, okay?
translations.汗で体冷やさないようにね: Make sure you don’t cool down with sweat!
translations.秋だからかな、お腹空いちゃった。授業終わったら、隠してたお菓子食べちゃお♪: Maybe it’s fall, but I’m getting hungry. Gonna snack on my hidden treats after class! ♪
translations.教室の窓から見る秋の風景って、なんだか切ないね。: The autumn view from the classroom window feels kinda bittersweet.
translations.この寒い日に外で体育、やだよぉ: I really don’t wanna have gym outside on a cold day.
translations.[22]が流行ってるみたいだから、▲主人公＊▲も気を付けてね: Looks like [22] is trending, so be careful, ▲主人公＊▲!
translations.私って、一日に何回「▲主人公＊▲は今何してるかな」って考えてるんだろう。気にし過: I wonder how many times a day I think, "What’s ▲主人公＊▲ up to?" Am I overthinking?
translations.ねえねえ、褒めて？なんでかは秘密！: Hey, hey, can you compliment me? Why? That's a secret!
translations.こっちはみんな居眠り中、そろそろ先生に怒られちゃうかも: Everyone here is dozing off. We might get in trouble with the teacher soon.
translations.次体育だぁ。なんとかがんばる: Next up is gym class. Gonna do my best!
translations.授業でわからないところがあったんだけど、とりあえずそのままにしちゃった。ほんとは: There was something I didn't get in class, but I just left it. I know I should've asked.
translations.退屈してない？私はちょっとだけ。: Aren't you bored? I'm a little.
translations.授業わかんなーい: I don't get anything in class.
translations.クラスの男の子たちがハシャぎ回ってる。▲主人公＊▲の方がよっぽど大人よね: The boys in class are being so loud. You're way more mature than them, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.▲主人公＊▲と同じクラスだったら、休み時間も楽しいのになぁ: If we were in the same class, break time would be so much fun!
translations.さっき▲主人公＊▲のこと、見かけたよ。そっちはわかった？: I just saw you, ▲主人公＊▲. Did you notice?
translations.フレーフレー！なんとなく: Go, go! Just kinda cheering you on.
translations.教室にはクーラーが絶対必要よね。: We definitely need air conditioning in the classroom.
translations.夏ってやっぱりくっつかれると、うっとうしい？私は、そんなことないんだけど: Summer can be annoying when you get too close, right? Not for me, though.
translations.葉っぱが舞ってる……そっちでも見えるかな: Leaves are falling... I wonder if you can see them too.
translations.教室の空気が悪いなあ、換気しなきゃ: The air in the classroom is bad. We need to ventilate.
translations.今日もさむ～い。お客様少ないかも: It's cold again today. Might be fewer customers.
translations.クラスの友達と恋バナ中。▲主人公＊▲のことたくさん白状させられちゃった▼: Talking about love with my friends. I spilled a lot about you, ▲主人公＊▲▼.
translations.クラスの友達と一緒にオシャレの研究中。女の子は大変なんだから♪: Studying fashion with my friends. Being a girl is tough! ♪
translations.クラスには映画の話が通じる友達がいないのよね。それがちょっと不満かなぁ: None of my friends in class get movie references. That's kinda frustrating.
translations.レビにタヌキが出てる。かわいー▼: There's a raccoon at the river. So cute! ▼
translations.レビの音が大きいって怒られちゃった。はあ: I got scolded for having the volume too loud. Ugh.
translations.飯食べながらテレビ観るのはお行儀悪いよね。気を付けてはいるんだけど……: Eating while watching TV is kinda rude, right? I try to be careful, but...
translations.イズ番組観てるけど、私けっこうこういうの得意なんだよ？: I'm watching a show, and I'm actually pretty good at this kind of stuff, you know?
translations.24]の料理って、なにが定番かな。献立考えてて: What’s a classic dish for 24]? I'm thinking about the menu.
translations.日は深夜に面白い映画やるよ、もし起きてたら観てみて？: There's a cool movie on late tonight. If you're awake, check it out?
translations.みの日に家で勉強するのって、無理よね……: Studying at home on a holiday is just impossible...
translations.所の小さな男の子と一緒に遊んだよ。嫉妬しちゃう？: I played with a little boy at the park. Are you jealous?
translations.24]だからって、寝坊はダメ！: Just because it's 24], don’t sleep in!
translations.ったかくなったけど、窓開けて寝ないようにね？: It’s getting chilly, but don’t forget to keep the window closed, okay?
translations.くてもしっかり食べなきゃダメよ？: Even if you're busy, you gotta eat properly, alright?
translations.近、[22]が流行ってるみたいだから、気を付けてね？: Seems like [22] is trending, so be careful, okay?
translations.いね、お互い風邪には気をつけようね: Let’s both be careful not to catch a cold.
translations.むーい。▲主人公＊▲は外出るとき気を付けてね？: Mmm. ▲主人公＊▲, be careful when you go out, okay?
translations.24]は、街のイルミネーションがきれいよね。一緒に観たいな: The city lights for 24] are beautiful. I wanna see them with you.
translations.達にあなたのことよく聞かれるけど……私、そういうとき隠せないのよね～: My friends ask about you a lot, but... I can’t hide it, you know?
translations.主人公＊▲に会いたいな……。ごめん、困らせちゃうよね: I really wanna see you, ▲主人公＊▲... Sorry if I’m being a bother.
translations.日はずーっとテレビ観てようかな……: I think I’ll just watch TV all day...
translations.日、宿題あった？: Did you have homework on the day?
translations.今日の晩御飯は気合入れよっと♪: Let’s put some effort into dinner tonight♪
translations.洗濯しなきゃ……楽しんでやればすぐ済むかな: I gotta do laundry... but if I enjoy it, it’ll be done in no time.
translations.おかず作り過ぎちゃった。隣に住んでれば、すぐに持っていけるのに: I made too much side dish. If we lived next door, I could just bring you some.
translations.尊敬してる人っている？私は……うーん、誰だろう: Do you have someone you really respect? Hmm, I wonder who that would be for me.
translations.なにしてる？私はベランダの掃除しようかなって: What are you up to? I was thinking of cleaning the balcony.
translations.ねえ。部屋、散らかしたりしてない？: Hey, is your room messy or what?
translations.大量に洗濯できると気持ちいいよね。逆に雨のときはユーウツ: It feels great to do a ton of laundry. But rainy days? Ugh.
translations.[24]は、なにか部屋に花が欲しくなるよね: When it’s [24], I always want flowers in the room.
translations.料理、失敗しちゃった。[24]だから眠くて……は言い訳か: I messed up cooking. I was so sleepy because of [24]... is that an excuse?
translations.花瓶の水かえるの忘れてダメにしちゃった……はあ: I forgot to change the water in the vase and it went bad... sigh.
translations.これだけ暑いと食欲も落ちちゃうなぁ。でもちゃんと食べないと体に悪いもんね、工夫し: With this heat, I’m losing my appetite. But I gotta eat right, so I’ll get creative.
translations.将来は広い庭のある家に住めたらいいよね、やっぱり: It’d be nice to live in a house with a big garden in the future, right?
translations.あーん、やっぱりご飯食べ過ぎちゃった！これからはダイエットの秋！: Ugh, I definitely overate! Time for a fall diet!
translations.風邪はひいて欲しくないけど、もしものときは看病してあげるからね▼: I don’t want you to catch a cold, but if you do, I’ll take care of you▼.
translations.冬になると、気づくと毎日鍋料理作っちゃう。豆乳にキムチにおでんに……色々あるもん: When winter comes, I find myself making hot pot every day. Soy milk, kimchi, oden... so many options!
translations.今日は家事をがんばる日！って決めたの: I decided today’s the day to tackle housework!
translations.今日の晩御飯は自信作！カレシとしても鼻が高くなるできだよ？: Tonight’s dinner is my pride and joy! You’ll be proud to call me your girlfriend, trust me!
translations.あー、今日の晩御飯は失敗……はあ: Ugh, tonight’s dinner was a flop... sigh.
translations.今日は掃除をがんばる日。キレイにしちゃうぞ～: Today’s the day I’m gonna clean! I’ll make it sparkle~
translations.今日も▲主人公＊▲がいるから私はハッピー♪: I’m happy today because I have ▲主人公＊▲ with me♪
translations.夜だから▲主人公＊▲に会えないのって、ちょっと理不尽だと思わない？: Isn't it kinda unfair that I can't see you at night, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.あーん、宿題おわんなーい！: Ugh, I can't finish my homework!
translations.今日はいつになく、人のフォローばかりしてた気がする。でもそんなにイヤじゃないの、: I feel like I was just following people all day. But it wasn't so bad, maybe 'cause you were around, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.▲主人公＊▲、あまり夜更かししないでね？: Hey, ▲主人公＊▲, don’t stay up too late, okay?
translations.宿題終わらなくてこんな時間……ねむいよ～: It's so late and I still haven't finished my homework... I'm so sleepy~
translations.今ね、もうほとんど眠りかけてたのにガバッ！って起きちゃった: I was almost asleep, then I suddenly woke up!
translations.あったかくなったね。でも窓開けて寝たらダメだよ: It's getting warm, but don't sleep with the window open, okay?
translations.寝苦しい季節、体調には気を付けてね: It's that stuffy season, so take care of yourself!
translations.今日は暑いね……すぐ汗かいちゃう: It's hot today... I start sweating so easily.
translations.虫の鳴き声って、なんだか眠くなるかも: The sound of bugs kinda makes me sleepy.
translations.秋の夜長……夜更かししていいってことじゃないよね: Autumn nights... doesn't mean we can stay up late, right?
translations.寒いね。風邪ひかないようにね？: It's cold, so don’t catch a cold, okay?
translations.今日はあったかくして、早めに寝よ？私もそうするから: Let’s stay warm and go to bed early tonight, okay? I will too.
translations.今日も１日▲主人公＊▲のことが大好きでした▼なんてね: I loved you all day today, ▲主人公＊▲▼ just saying.
translations.おやすみのキス。ほんとは直接したいのにな: Goodnight kiss. I wish I could give you one in person.
translations.たくさん働くと気持ちよく眠れるよね？: Working hard helps you sleep well, right?
translations.私はもう寝るね。ばいば～い: I'm going to sleep now. Bye-bye!
translations.明日も一緒にがんばろ～: Let’s do our best together tomorrow~
translations.寝付けないなあ、最近多いかも: I can't sleep, it's been happening a lot lately.
translations.宿題難しいなあ、そっちの学年はどうなのかな: Homework's tough... How's it going for you in your grade?
translations.今日はまだしばらく起きてよっかな: I think I'll stay up for a bit longer.
translations.会いたい……会いたいな▼: I miss you... really miss you ▼.
translations.特に用事はないんだけど、メールでーす: Just checking in, no special reason.
translations.今日は楽しい一日でした。明日もそうなるようがんばる: Today was fun! Gonna try to make tomorrow just as good.
translations.珍しく早く寝ようとしたけど……やっぱり目が覚めてダメでした: I tried to go to bed early for once, but I ended up waking up again.
translations.寝坊しちゃダメだよ？▲主人公＊▲は、私を起こしてくれなきゃ: Don't oversleep, okay? ▲主人公＊▲ has to wake me up.
translations.▲主人公＊▲、まだ起きてる？先に夢の世界で待ってまーす: ▲主人公＊▲, are you still awake? I'll be waiting in dreamland.
translations.暑いね、だからってくっついちゃダメっていうことはないでしょ？: It's hot, but that doesn't mean we can't cuddle, right?
translations.あまり薄着して寝ると風邪ひいちゃうから気を付けてね: Be careful not to catch a cold by sleeping in too little clothing.
translations.テレビで映画観てたらこんな時間。そろそろ寝ようかな……: I was watching a movie on TV and lost track of time. Should I go to bed soon...?
translations.夜食食べちゃった……うーん、どうしよう: I had a late-night snack... ugh, what should I do?
translations.毎日寒いね。こんなときはやっぱりあなたに会いたいな: It's been cold every day. Times like this, I really want to see you.
translations.▲主人公＊▲？ネネはさびしいですよー: ▲主人公＊▲? I'm feeling lonely over here.
translations.夜は嫌いじゃないけど、あなたに会えないのはイヤ: I don't mind the night, but I hate not being able to see you.
translations.あのね……だいすきだよ♪: You know... I really like you ♪.
translations.▲主人公＊▲が今考えてること当てます……ネネちゃん大好き！どう？: I can guess what you're thinking... I love you, Nene! How's that?
translations.今日も一日がんばった。うん、充実してる感じする: I worked hard today. Yeah, I feel pretty fulfilled.
translations.日はお客さん少なくて助かるなぁ。いつもこうだと、退屈だけどね: It's nice when there aren't many customers. But if it were always like this, it would get boring.
translations.んー！今日はなんだか▲主人公＊▲の夢が見られる気がする！: Hmm! I feel like I’m gonna dream about you tonight, ▲主人公＊▲!
translations.今日も一日お疲れさまです。: Thanks for today, you did great.
translations.ゆっくり休んでね、あ・な・た▼: Take it easy and rest up, okay? ▼
translations.お布団の中から送信！: Sending this from my cozy bed!
translations.明日からまたがんばろ。もちろん二人でね？: Let’s do our best again starting tomorrow, together, right?
translations.日は入浴剤入れちゃおっと♪: I’m gonna add some bath salts tonight♪
translations.はかなり長く入っちゃうんだよね: I tend to stay in the bath for a while.
translations.間、こういう凡ミスってなくならないよね: These little mistakes just never go away, do they?
translations.れって、この仕事のやりがいのひとつだよね: But hey, that’s part of what makes this job rewarding.
translations.供もカワイイけど、やっぱり▲主人公＊▲が一番よね▼: The kids are cute, but you’re still my favorite, ▲主人公＊▲▼.
translations.ふ、ちゃんと授業も聞きます: I’ll make sure to pay attention in class.
translations.はよう[32]気持ちの良い朝だね。: What a nice morning it is.
translations.ーニングコールされちゃった。おはよ[32]: I got a morning call. Good morning!
translations.日はお客さん多くて忙しいよぉ。デキシーズって結構客入りの波が激しいよね、大丈夫な: It’s super busy today with lots of customers. The rush at Dixie's can be intense, right? Hope it’s okay.
translations.日の店長、すごく機嫌良さそう。何があったんだろ？: The manager seems really happy today. I wonder what happened?
translations.日の店長、すごく機嫌悪そう。みんな近づかないようにしてるよ: The manager looks really grumpy today. Everyone’s trying to keep their distance.
translations.タッフの子たちが休憩室にファッション雑誌置いてくれるから、助かっちゃうな♪女子力: The staff leave fashion magazines in the break room, which is so helpful! It’s a secret to boosting my girl power♪
translations.掃除終わり！汗かいちゃったけど、着替え持ってきて良かった♪: Cleaning's done! I broke a sweat, but I'm glad I brought a change of clothes♪
translations.は限定デザートが多くて、仕事中でも気になっちゃうな。男の子はそうでもないのかな？: There are so many limited desserts at work, I can’t help but think about them even while working. Do guys feel the same?
translations.はね、よくデキシーズに行くとき遠回りするの。だってお散歩したい季節じゃない？: I tend to take the long way when I go to Dixie's. It’s such a nice season for a walk, don’t you think?
translations.はドリンクバーの中身がすぐなくなっちゃうから、▲主人公＊▲も気を付けておいてね: The drink bar runs out super fast, so make sure to keep an eye on it, okay ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.くでお祭りがあるときはお店が大変なことになるからね、覚悟しておいて？: When there's a festival, it gets crazy at the shop, so be prepared, okay?
translations.っき落ち葉で滑って転びそうになっちゃった。恥ずかしかったよー: I almost slipped on some leaves and fell. So embarrassing!
translations.は季節限定メニューが多くて大変。結構間違える子が多いからフォローしないと: There are a lot of seasonal menu items, so it’s tough. Lots of people make mistakes, so I have to help out.
translations.の限定メニューは調理が大変。オーダー重なると辛いけど、気を付けてね: The limited menu items are tricky to prepare. It gets tough when orders pile up, so be careful.
translations.日は外の掃除なんだけど、きっと寒いよね……: I have to clean outside today, but it’s probably going to be cold…
translations.のバイトの制服姿、すき？: Do you like my part-time job uniform?
translations.人同士で一緒のバイト先って、なんだかうれしい、ね▼: It’s kinda nice working at the same place together, right▼?
translations.主人公＊▲のバイトの制服姿、かっこいいよ▼: You look great in your part-time job uniform, ▲主人公＊▲▼.
translations.日はシフト組みのミスで、スタッフ入れ過ぎちゃったみたい。店長は悔しがってたけど、: Looks like there was a mix-up with the shift schedule today, and we have too many staff. The manager was upset, but it might make things easier.
translations.日、スタッフが２人も病欠だって。きっと修羅場が起きるよ？: Two staff members called in sick today. It’s gonna be a hectic day, huh?
translations.日の店長、すごく落ち込んでるみたい。本部から何か言われたのかな？: The manager seems really down. I wonder if they got some bad news from headquarters?
translations.後もこのままの～んびりいこう？: Should we just keep taking it easy like this?
translations.▲主人公＊▲、ヒマしてない？ぼーっとする時間も大切だけど、ずっとそうだともったい: Hey ▲主人公＊▲, you not busy? It's cool to chill, but we can't just waste time, right?
translations.たまに口がさびしくなっちゃうの。やっぱり飴持ってると、便利だよ？: Sometimes I get a little bored. Having candy on hand is super handy, you know?
translations.あのね、メールで送る内容わすれちゃった。きっとたいしたことじゃないと思うんだけど: I totally forgot what I wanted to email you about. I’m sure it wasn’t anything important.
translations.毎日が楽しいと、１日がすぐ終わっちゃうのが寂しいな。: When every day is fun, it makes me sad how fast they fly by.
translations.日は珍しく店長に怒られちゃった。: Today, I got chewed out by the manager for a change.
translations.日はお客様にたくさんほめられちゃった。: Today, I got a ton of compliments from customers.
translations.例えばバイトも宿題もない日って、今日はなんでもできる！って気になるんだけど、なぜ: On days when I have no work or homework, I feel like I can do anything! But somehow, time just slips away... it's weird.
translations.デキシーズの掃除、ついついやりすぎちゃった。一度気になると、もうやらずにはいられ: I kinda overdid it with cleaning the Dicksies. Once I start, I can't help myself!
translations.バイトがない日って、あー楽だなーって思うんだけど。いざ暇だと落ち着かなかったり、: On days without work, I think, "Ah, this is nice!" But when I'm actually free, I can't relax, and I have trouble sleeping at night. It's not going well.
translations.レビのドキュメンタリーでね、勤労少女の特集だって。私もそうなのかなあ？: I saw a documentary about working girls on Revi. I wonder if I’m like that?
translations.濯物がきれいにたためると、ちょっと達成感ない？▲主人公＊▲はわかるかな？: Isn't it satisfying when you can fold laundry nicely? Do you get that, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.日作ったご飯、自信作！あーあ、▲主人公＊▲にも食べさせたかったな。: The meal I made today is my pride and joy! Ugh, I wish I could've shared it with you, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.なんだか眠いんだけど、今寝ちゃうと、中途半端だよね。: I'm feeling kinda sleepy, but if I sleep now, it’ll be so half-hearted.
translations.ちょっと食欲ないな、お菓子食べ過ぎちゃったのかも……。: I don't have much of an appetite... maybe I ate too many snacks.
translations.今夜の洋画、チェックしてる？: Are you checking out the movie tonight?
translations.今日は家事、たくさんがんばった！えらい？: I worked really hard on chores today! Am I awesome?
translations.明日はどんな一日になるかな。: I wonder what tomorrow will be like.
translations.ねむいよー、でも今やってる映画が面白くて眠れないよー。: I'm so sleepy, but this movie I'm watching is too good to sleep!
translations.ょっとお散歩してこようかな♪: Thinking about going for a little walk♪
translations.休みだって、ちゃんと計画的に行動しないとね。: Since it’s a day off, gotta plan things out.
translations.レビに出てきたワンちゃんかわいい♪: That puppy in the game is so cute♪
translations.はやっぱり白いご飯とお味噌汁よね。: Nothing beats white rice and miso soup.
translations.散歩すると春のいぶきを感じるよ。: You can really feel spring when you walk.
translations.はまだちょっと眠いんだ。この季節はいくらでも寝られるよね。: I’m still a bit sleepy. This season makes you want to sleep forever.
translations.汗かいてるんじゃない？シャワーでスッキリしようね。: Aren’t you sweating? Let’s freshen up with a shower.
translations.いからってエアコンばっかり使っちゃダメだよ。: Don’t just rely on the AC all the time.
translations.の時期って、朝ごはんも美味しいんだよね。: Breakfast is especially tasty this season.
translations.聞とりに外に出たら、息が白かったよ: When I went outside, my breath was white.
translations.ん、今日もがんばろっと！: Alright, let’s do our best today!
translations.日もがんばろうね。: Let’s make today a good one too.
translations.うこんな時間かぁ[32]: Wow, is it already this late?
translations.ん、もう寝ないとね[32]: Guess I should get to bed soon.
translations.実した1日だったかな？: Did you have a good day?
translations.はもう眠さの限界だったの。: I was totally at my limit with sleep.
translations.意義な休日だったかな？: Was it a meaningful day off?
translations.主人公＊▲も寝なきゃダメだぞ！: You need to get some sleep too, ▲主人公＊▲!
translations.坊しないようにしなきゃね。: Gotta make sure I don’t oversleep.
translations.の時期、布団の種類に悩むよね。: This time of year, I always struggle with which bedding to use.
translations.っかり干したから、お布団から太陽の香りがするよ。: I dried it outside, so my bedding smells like sunshine.
translations.アコンつけたまま寝ると、夏風邪ひいちゃうから気をつけてね。: Be careful sleeping with the AC on, or you might catch a summer cold.
translations.強してたらいつのまにかこんな時間かぁ。: Wow, how did it get so late?
translations.虫がやさしく鳴いてるね。: I can hear the bugs chirping softly.
translations.布団冷たいのイヤだから、布団乾燥機使っちゃおっと。: I hate cold bedding, so I’ll use the dryer.
translations.業中にいけないんだ[32]: You shouldn’t be texting in class! [32]
translations.ゃんと授業に集中してるよ: I’m totally focused on my lessons.
translations.はちょっと眠かったんだ。: I was just a bit sleepy.
translations.にも隠れてメールしてる人、いるけどね。: I know some people are sneaking in texts, though.
translations.憩時間まで待てないの？ワガママねぇ。: Can't wait until break? You're so spoiled.
translations.まにはいいけど、何度もメールしちゃダメだよ？: It's okay sometimes, but don’t spam me, okay?
translations.は▲主人公＊▲へのメールを打ってたの。びっくりしちゃった。: I was texting ▲主人公＊▲. Totally surprised!
translations.生の言うこと、ちゃんと聞いてる？: Are you really listening to what I say?
translations.日の授業は試験に出そうね。しっかりチェックしなきゃ！: Looks like today's class might be on the test. Gotta pay attention!
translations.ったかいからウトウトしてたんじゃない？: You were dozing off 'cause it was warm, right?
translations.の陽気で、ぼーっとしてる人が多いかも。そっちはどう？: With this weather, a lot of people are zoning out. How about you?
translations.く夏休みになればいいのにね[32]: I wish it would just be summer vacation already!
translations.ついよぉ～。プールの授業まだかな？: I can't wait! When's our pool class?
translations.の季節は集中できるよね。: This season is perfect for focusing.
translations.をフル回転させると、お腹すかない？: Doesn't your brain start to crave snacks?
translations.が冷たいよ。袖の中にいれちゃおっと[32]: It's chilly. I think I'll tuck my hands in my sleeves.
translations.ート着たまま授業受けちゃダメなのかなあ？: Is it not okay to wear my coat during class?
translations.業中のメールはほどほどにね[32]: Keep the texting during class to a minimum.
translations.、先生コッチきた！じゃあね[32]: Uh-oh, the teacher's coming this way! Talk later!
translations.、返事遅れた？お風呂に入ってたの。: Sorry for the late reply! I was in the bath.
translations.う少し起きてるつもり。: I plan to stay up a bit longer.
translations.肌の手入れをしないとね[32]: Gotta take care of my skin, you know? [32]
translations.主人公＊▲はもうお風呂入った？: Have you taken a bath yet, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.主人公＊▲は何してたの？: What have you been up to, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.れた部分もしっかり洗わないとね。: I need to wash all the parts properly.
translations.主人公＊▲はどんなシャンプー使ってるの？: What shampoo do you use, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.主人公＊▲ってリンスやコンディショナーは使うの？: Do you use conditioner or rinse, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.いつい長湯しちゃったな。: I kinda got carried away in the bath.
translations.日は若葉の香りの入浴剤。季節感あるよね。: I'm using a bath additive with a fresh leaf scent. So seasonal, right?
translations.浴剤の代わりにお庭で摘んだお花を浮かべてみました[32]: I floated some flowers I picked from the garden instead of bath additives. [32]
translations.えてものすごく熱いお湯に入ってみたよ。ちょっとしたサウナ気分[32]: I tried soaking in really hot water. It felt like a mini sauna! [32]
translations.風呂にしてみました。なんか逆に体がぽかぽかするかも。: I made it a bath. It actually made me feel warm all over.
translations.日は半身浴で1時間くらい入ってたんだ。: I was in a half bath for about an hour.
translations.主人公＊▲って、お風呂で本を読む？: Do you read in the bath, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.ょっと童心に返って、浴槽に潜ってみたの。子供っぽいかな？: I kinda went back to my childhood and submerged in the tub. Is that childish?
translations.濯したてのパジャマは気持ちいいな[32]: Freshly washed pajamas feel so nice. [32]
translations.う、マッサージして欲しいな。なんちゃって[32]: I wish I could get a massage. Just kidding! [32]
translations.ザートは何にしよっかな～♪: What should I have for dessert~♪
translations.ちそうさま[32]洗い物しなきゃ！: Thanks for the meal! Gotta do the dishes!
translations.強中です。1人だと寂しいな[32]: It's tough. I feel lonely doing it alone.
translations.う、一息つこうかな。: Hmm, maybe I should take a break.
translations.主人公＊▲はもう宿題終わったの？: Have you finished your homework yet, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.ょうど休憩しようかと思ってたの、良いタイミングのメールだったわ[32]: I was just thinking of taking a break, so your message came at a perfect time!
translations.題以外にもちゃんと勉強しないとね。私3年生だし。: I need to study properly, not just for tests. I'm in my third year, after all.
translations.休みでも、勉強は大切だよ。: Even on breaks, studying is important.
translations.題は出てないんだけど、ちょっとわかりにくかった授業の復習をしてるの。: I haven't gotten any assignments, but I'm reviewing a class that was a bit confusing.
translations.手な教科はある？おねえさんが個人授業してあげよっか[32]: Is there a subject you need help with? I can give you some private lessons!
translations.主人公＊▲は勉強してる？遊んでばっかじゃダメだよ？: Are you studying, ▲主人公＊▲? You can't just play all the time, you know?
translations.ょっと疲れたから、お散歩してこようかな。: I'm a bit tired, so I think I'll go for a walk.
translations.主人公＊▲はちゃんと授業理解してる？今が大事な時だよ？: Are you really understanding your classes, ▲主人公＊▲? This is a crucial time!
translations.が疲れたら、甘いものが良いんだよ。だからアイスを食べます！: When you're tired, sweets are the way to go. So I'm having ice cream!
translations.イスレモンティーを飲んで、ちょっとリフレッシュ[32]: I'm drinking some lemon tea to refresh myself.
translations.っき晩御飯たべたのに、お腹へってきちゃった。: I had dinner not long ago, but I'm getting hungry again.
translations.ったかくしすぎると眠くなるし、寒いと効率落ちるのよね。: If it's too warm, I get sleepy, and if it's cold, my efficiency drops.
translations.事中のメールはマナー違反だからね。食べ終わってからメールしたの。: It's rude to text while eating, right? I texted after I finished.
translations.べてる途中にメールを見ると、集中できなくて消化に悪そうだよね。: Looking at messages while eating makes it hard to focus and probably messes with digestion.
translations.主人公＊▲はどうしてるの？もうご飯食べた？: What are you up to, ▲主人公＊▲? Have you eaten yet?
translations.つか▲主人公＊▲を我が家のディナーに招待したいな[32]: I want to invite ▲主人公＊▲ over for dinner! [32]
translations.にしか食べられないお野菜がたくさんあるんだよ。: There are lots of veggies you can only get here.
translations.ラダに春野菜をたくさん使ってみました♪: I used a ton of spring veggies in the salad! ♪
translations.は食欲無くなるって言うけど、私は食べちゃうんだよね。ダイエットしなきゃ！: They say it kills your appetite, but I just eat anyway. I need to diet!
translations.といえばそうめんよね。そういえば、流しそうめんてやったことある？: Speaking of which, it's all about somen, right? Have you ever done nagashi somen?
translations.はなんでも美味しくて、つい食べ過ぎちゃうよね。ガマンガマン！: Everything's so good, I end up eating too much. Gotta hold back!
translations.の美味しい季節だよね♪: It's the perfect season for them! ♪
translations.日はクラスのみんなでお弁当の交換会。私のお弁当、評判よかったよ: We had a bento exchange in class today. My bento got great reviews!
translations.日はお弁当じゃないから、学食でおそば食べたよ。: Today wasn't bento, so I had soba at the cafeteria.
translations.ういえば、▲主人公＊▲って料理作れるの？: By the way, can you cook, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.主人公＊▲も風邪引かないように、あったかいカッコで勉強しようね。: Make sure to stay warm while studying, okay? Don't catch a cold like me!
translations.ょっと難問に悩んでます。参考書の答えみようかなあ……。: I’m stuck on a tricky problem. Should I check the answer in the reference book...?
translations.度一緒に勉強会しよっか？わからないところは教えてあげるから[32]: Wanna study together? I can help with anything you don’t get.
translations.と一息、がんばるぞー♪: Let’s take a breather and keep pushing through♪
translations.室の外が騒がしいな。なんだろう？: It’s noisy outside the room. I wonder what’s going on?
translations.母さんが食器割っちゃったみたい。ちょっと手伝ってくるね。: Looks like Mom broke a dish. Gonna help her out for a bit.
translations.くびしてるとこ、男子にみられちゃった。恥かしい！: I got caught stretching by some guys. So embarrassing!
translations.だっもう夕方？早いなぁ。: Wait, is it evening already? Time flies!
translations.っというまに、こんな時間かぁ。: Wow, can’t believe it’s already this late.
translations.、メールだ。今日はお掃除してたよ[32]: Oh, got an email. I was cleaning today.
translations.日は家族みんなのんびりしてます。: Everyone's just relaxing at home today.
translations.を切ろうかな。: I’m thinking about cutting my hair.
translations.部屋の模様替えをしようか悩んでるトコ。: I’m debating whether to redecorate my room.
translations.れ？今日は何してたんだっけ？: What was I up to today again?
translations.になっちゃった。今日は1日過ぎるの早かったなあ。: It’s already gone by so fast. Today flew by!
translations.レビでネイチャー番組やってたから、ずっと見てた。かわいい動物がたくさんだよ[32: I was watching a nature show on TV. So many cute animals!
translations.レビでやってたダイエット体操をやってみてるところ。結構キツいなあ。: I’m trying out the workout from that diet show on TV. It’s pretty tough!
translations.主人公＊▲のコト考えてたよ[32]: I was thinking about you, you know.
