translations.午後の授業ってさ、集中できないんだよね。昼食べたら眠くなるじゃん: Afternoon classes are hard to focus in too. I always get sleepy after lunch.
translations.なんとなく消化不良の日ってあるよね: You know those days when you just feel off?
translations.授業早く終わんないかな: I wish class would end already.
translations.寝過ぎるとさ、頭痛くなるよね。だから、てきとーに寝ることにしたよ: If I sleep too much, I get a headache. So I decided to just nap a bit.
translations.春だねぇ。周りも結構寝てるし、そこに▲凛▲が一人加わったところで問題ないじゃんね: It's spring! Everyone's kinda napping, and adding Rinko to the mix isn't a problem, right? So, goodnight!
translations.春はさ、授業サボって屋上で寝るのが一番気持ちいいんだよね: Spring is the best for skipping class and napping on the rooftop.
translations.これからプール、それだけ: Heading to the pool, that's all.
translations.あつい！あつい！あつい！男は服の上から水を掛けてる……▲凛▲もやりたい！: So hot! So hot! So hot! The guys are splashing water on each other... I wanna do that too!
translations.外に枯葉が舞ってる。ジャジィだね: Leaves are dancing outside. It's kinda jazzy.
translations.芸術の秋だから美術の補習だってさ、冗談じゃないっつーの。至高の芸術は音楽でしょ？: They say it's art season, so we have art make-up classes. Seriously? Music is the real art, right?
translations.▲凛▲は暑いの苦手だけど、だからって寒いのが平気ってわけでもないし。もう外に出た: I can't handle the heat, but that doesn't mean I'm okay with the cold either. I just wanna stay inside...
translations.寒いから、ぜんっぜん集中出来ない。もともと集中してたかは、あやしいけどさ: It's so cold, I can't concentrate at all. Not that I was focused to begin with, honestly.
translations.授業中だけどメールしてみる。▲凛▲からのメールうれしい？: In class right now, but I thought I'd text. Are you happy to get a message from me?
translations.▲主人公＊▲が同学年だったら、宿題見せてもらえるのに。あ、ノート渡せばやってくれ: If you were in my grade, I could show you my homework. Oh, if I give you my notes, will you do it for me?
translations.教科書がネコの写真集になればいいのににゃ: I wish the textbook was a cat photo book, meow.
translations.やば、授業寝てた……。: Oh no, I totally dozed off in class...
translations.休み時間になるとハシャぎ出すのってなんなの？: Why does everyone get so hyped when break starts?
translations.たまに眺めるんだよね、ネコの写真集。でも生のネコ見たいな: Sometimes I look at cat photo books, but I wanna see real cats.
translations.今、何が見えてる？とかさ、別に意味はないんだけど。: What do you see right now? Not that it really matters.
translations.今日の帰りはどこ寄ろうかな: Where should I stop on my way home today?
translations.クラスの女子はカレシと好きな男の話ばっか。: The girls in class only talk about their boyfriends and crushes.
translations.さっき廊下で▲主人公＊▲のこと、見かけたよ。何してたの？: I saw you in the hallway earlier. What were you up to?
translations.暑くもなく寒くもなく、一番いい季節だね。だからって勉強する気はおきないけど: It's not too hot or too cold, the perfect season. But that doesn't make me want to study.
translations.春って過ごしやすいのはいいんだけど、いまいちロックじゃないよね。のどかでさ: Spring is nice and comfortable, but it’s not really rockin’, you know? It’s all calm and stuff.
translations.暑い…何か食べよ。サラダくらい簡単に作れるつーの: It's hot... I should eat something. A salad's easy to whip up.
translations.近所のゴミ収集所が凄い事になってた。あれはロックだね: The local trash collection spot was wild. That's some serious rock.
translations.秋の夕暮れってさ、詩的だよね。▲主人公＊▲には難しいかもしんないけど: Autumn evenings are so poetic, right? Might be tough for you, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.本を読みながらコロコロとゴミ取りしてたら、▲凛▲の周りだけキレイになったよ: I was reading while tidying up, and only ▲凛▲'s area got clean.
translations.暑いときには熱いものを食べるのがいいとか言うけど、逆はないよね。なんでだろ: They say eating hot food in the heat is good, but the opposite isn’t true. Why's that?
translations.宿題やるの忘れてた。まぁいっか: I totally forgot about my homework. Oh well.
translations.弟をお風呂に入れてきたよ。次は▲主人公＊▲の番かな？なんてね、冗談だけど: I just gave my little brother a bath. Next up is ▲主人公＊▲? Just kidding!
translations.あと何年したらさ、夜も一緒にいられるんだろね。: How many more years until we can spend nights together?
translations.あのさ、宿題とかやった？こっちのことは聞かないでほしいんだけど: So, did you finish your homework? Please don’t ask about mine.
translations.年頃の娘としてはさ、もっと家事の手伝いとかすべき？する気ないけど: As a girl my age, should I help out more with chores? Not that I want to.
translations.▲主人公＊▲のおかげでさ、これでも▲凛▲は毎日幸せだよ。ありがと: Thanks to you, ▲主人公＊▲, ▲凛▲ is happy every day. Really.
translations.布団の中から▲主人公＊▲に送信: Sending this from under the covers to ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.今日も▲凛▲の一日は▲主人公＊▲とのメールで終わり！: Another day ends with emails from ▲主人公＊▲!
translations.▲主人公＊▲もあんまり夜更かししないでよ: Don't stay up too late, okay?
translations.きっと明日は早起きするから。たぶん: I’ll probably wake up early tomorrow.
translations.まだ眠くないんだけど、そろそろ寝ないと明日辛いよね。: I’m not sleepy yet, but I should sleep soon or tomorrow will be rough.
translations.これだけ布団が気持ちいと、寝坊しない自信はないかも: With how comfy this blanket is, I might not wake up on time.
translations.至福の時間の始まりだよ: It’s the start of blissful time!
translations.頃、夏フェスの番組やってる。行きたいけど、面倒じゃんね: They're showing a summer festival program. I wanna go, but it's such a hassle.
translations.腹痛い。今日アイス２本食べたからかな: My stomach hurts. Maybe it's because I had two ice creams today.
translations.の鳴き声がうるさい……: The sound of the birds is so loud...
translations.近たまに寒いけどさ、風邪なんてひかないでよ。: It's kinda cold lately, but don't catch a cold, okay?
translations.レビでスキーの特集やってる。寒いのはヤだけど、滑りたいな: They're doing a ski feature on TV. I hate the cold, but I wanna ski.
translations.日は寒いから弟と一緒に寝ようかな。一緒に布団入るとさ、あったかいんだよね: It's cold today, so I might sleep with my little brother. It’s warm when we share a blanket.
translations.マ～。ま、ヒマなのはいいことだ。▲主人公＊▲のことでも考えてよ: Well, being bored is kinda nice. Think about me, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.っぱ自分の部屋が落ち着く。▲主人公＊▲の隣の次くらいには: Nothing beats chilling in my own room. Just a little less than being next to ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.からネコの鳴き声が聞こえる。見に行こっかな: I can hear a cat meowing outside. Should I go check it out?
translations.まんない番組ばっか。なんか面白いことない？: There's nothing but boring shows on. Isn't there anything interesting?
translations.年頃の娘としてはさ、家事とか手伝った方がいいのかな: As a girl my age, should I help out with chores?
translations.お母さんがさ、晩御飯の準備手伝えって。上手くできるかな……: Mom told me to help prepare dinner. I hope I can do it well...
translations.弟がお母さんに怒られて泣いちゃってさ、▲凛▲がフォロー中。こうやって頼られるの、: My little brother got scolded by Mom and started crying. ▲凛▲ is comforting him. It makes me happy to be relied on as an older sister.
translations.たまには、晩御飯の準備手伝ってこよっかな: Maybe I should help with dinner prep once in a while.
translations.昼間に家にいるとさ、爆音で音楽聴けるからいいよね。アイロンがけ手伝わされたけど: Being home during the day is great because I can blast my music. I got roped into helping with ironing, though.
translations.洗濯機がこわれた。こわしたんじゃないよ、こわれたんだよ: The washing machine broke. I didn't break it, it just broke.
translations.お母さんがドラマ見て興奮してる。掃除の途中なのに: Mom's getting all excited watching her drama, even though she's in the middle of cleaning.
translations.眠い。弟と昼寝しよ。掃除の途中だけど: I'm sleepy. Gonna take a nap with my little brother, even though I'm supposed to be cleaning.
translations.今日のご飯なんだろ。あんまり嫌いなものないといいけど: I wonder what we're having for dinner today. I hope there’s nothing I really dislike.
translations.どうしよ、暑くてやる気でない。もともと勉強する気はなかったけど: Ugh, it’s so hot, I just can't get motivated. Not like I was planning to study anyway.
translations.帰り道の暑さを想像すると……はぁ: Just thinking about the heat on the way home... sigh.
translations.秋は物悲しい季節、なんて陳腐な表現だよね: Fall is such a melancholic season, right? Kind of a cliché.
translations.読書の秋とかいうけど、冬の方が部屋にこもって本読むイメージじゃんね。なんとなく: They say it’s the season for reading, but I feel like winter is more about curling up with a book.
translations.暖房ついた教室で寝るなっていう方が無理じゃん？: Isn’t it unreasonable to expect me not to nap in a heated classroom?
translations.はぁ、帰り道も寒そう……: Sigh, the way home sounds cold...
translations.わざわざ休み時間を割いてメールくれる優しいカノジョでよかったね。: Aww, you’re such a sweet girlfriend for taking time to text me.
translations.あのさ、教室でイチャつく人間ってどう思う？別に▲凛▲はそんなことしたくないんだけ: So, what do you think about people getting all lovey-dovey in class? Not that I want to do that, since I’m not even there.
translations.なんかクラスメートに雑誌読まされた。「カレを誘惑する１０の小悪魔テクニック」だっ: Some classmates made me read this magazine. It was called "10 Devilish Tricks to Seduce Your Boyfriend."
translations.あれ、今日って何かまともなことしたっけ？って思う日ない？時間盗まれたような感覚。: Ever have those days where you wonder if you did anything worthwhile? Feels like time just got stolen.
translations.レビ点けてみ、面白いのやってる: Check out the TV, they’re showing something interesting.
translations.ういや宿題あったんだよね。別にやんなくてもいっか: Oh right, I had homework. But I guess I can skip it.
translations.はスピーカーで音楽聴けないけどさ、ヘッドフォンも結構好きなんだよね。音の分離が良: I can’t listen to music on the speakers, but I actually like headphones too. The sound separation is nice.
translations.読み始めた本が面白いからさ、今夜中に読破してやるんだ: I started a really interesting book, so I’m gonna finish it tonight.
translations.っとパジャマ着てたらお母さんに怒られた。このままが楽なのに: I got in trouble for wearing pajamas. I was just trying to be comfy!
translations.んかお父さんがさ、学校であったこととかよく聞いてくるようになったんだよね。前はそ: My dad has been asking about what happens at school a lot lately. He never used to do that.
translations.と遊ぼうと思ったのに、外に遊びに行っちゃった。子供は元気だね: I wanted to play with you, but I went outside to play instead. Kids have so much energy!
translations.主人公＊▲って、休みは家で何してんの？: What do you usually do at home on your days off, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.やってるバラエティのジングルにデスジャビの曲が使われてた。たまにこういうのがある: They used a Death Jabi song for the jingle on the variety show I’m watching. It’s funny how that happens sometimes.
translations.限定ポテチの、さくらんぼ味がさ。ゲテモノかと思いきや妙にクセになるんだよね。甘し: There’s this limited edition cherry-flavored potato chips. Thought it’d be gross, but it’s oddly addictive. The sweet and salty combo lingers.
translations.今日は弟が一緒に寝ようってさ。嬉しいんだけど、今の季節は暑いのがね……: My little brother wants to sleep with me tonight. I'm happy, but it's so hot this season...
translations.でもこれだけ暑いと、すぐには寝られないかも: But with it being this hot, I might not fall asleep right away.
translations.まだあんま眠くないけど、寒いからもう寝る: I'm not super sleepy yet, but it's cold, so I'm gonna sleep now.
translations.いまから▲凛▲は冬眠に入りまーす: I'm going into hibernation now, just so you know.
translations.▲主人公＊▲が風邪ひいて▲凛▲にうつされたらたまんないからさ、ちゃんとあったかく: I can't let you catch a cold from me, so make sure to stay warm and sleep well.
translations.隣に▲主人公＊▲が居てくれたらなー、なんてね: I wish you were here next to me, just saying.
translations.おやすみのチュッ▼とかさ、ほんとにやってる人いんのかな: I wonder if anyone actually does goodnight kisses? ▼
translations.▲凛▲さ、夢覚えてることってあんまりないんだよね。▲主人公＊▲が出てても忘れてる: I don't usually remember my dreams. Even if you’re in them, I might forget. Sorry!
translations.▲凛▲は今日もがんばった。ほんとがんばった。だから寝る: I did my best today. Really, I did. So I'm going to sleep.
translations.なんかそんな気分だから言っとくけど。▲凛▲、▲主人公＊▲のこと好きだよ。: Just feeling like saying this, but... I like you, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.▲凛▲なかなか寝付けないよ、▲主人公＊▲: I can’t fall asleep yet, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.お父さん寝ちゃった。我が家の夜は▲凛▲のものだね。: Dad fell asleep. The night is mine now.
translations.弟の部屋まで寝顔見に行っちゃった。天使みたいにカワイイよ: I went to check on my little brother's sleeping face. He's so cute, like an angel.
translations.アイタイ。ん……やっぱいいや: I miss you. Hmm... never mind.
translations.まだ起きてる？特に用事はないんだけど、メールに付き合ってよ: Are you still awake? I don't have anything special to say, but can you chat with me?
translations.今日の休みはどうだった？充実してた？: How was your day off? Did you enjoy it?
translations.今日中に読みたい本があったんだけど、ちょっと厳しそう。明日に持ち越すか: I wanted to read a book today, but it looks like I might have to put it off until tomorrow.
translations.▲凛▲寝坊したら、▲主人公＊▲起こしにきていいよ: If I oversleep, feel free to come wake me up, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.深夜ラジオさ、たまにレアな曲が流れるから面白いよね。聞きながら眠っちゃったりもす: Late-night radio can play some rare songs, which is fun. I sometimes fall asleep while listening.
translations.ょっと居眠りしてたかも。: I might've dozed off a bit.
translations.っち、今なんの授業？: So, what class are you in now?
translations.ーはやく学校終わって遊びに行きたいよ。: I just wanna finish school and hang out.
translations.業中。こういうのって社会に出て役立つのかねぇ？: In class. I wonder if this stuff will help in the real world?
translations.勉強中。今日の授業はおもしろいな。: Studying. Today's class is actually interesting.
translations.室暑い～、うちわがほしいよ。: It's hot in here~ I wish I had a fan.
translations.ー、プールの授業まだかなあ……: I can't wait for pool class to start...
translations.室に蜂が入ってきて大騒ぎ。▲凛▲は一番に逃げたよ。: A bee just flew in, and it was chaos! ▲凛▲ was the first to run away.
translations.むさむ～！なんかあったまる方法ないかな？: So hot! Is there a way to cool down?
translations.ういう▲主人公＊▲はどうなのさ、授業に集中してる？: How about you, ▲主人公＊▲? Are you focused in class?
translations.気覚ましに、たまにメールしてよね。: Send me a text sometimes to wake me up.
translations.にもメールしてる子いるねえ。: I see some other kids texting too.
translations.っと！先生が横を通過！ヤバかった～: Whoa! The teacher just walked by! That was close~.
translations.って、お風呂入ってたんだよ。: I was in the bath, you know.
translations.では運動部が汗流してるね……。この暑いのに、よくやる: Looks like the sports teams are sweating it out... I can't believe they're doing that in this heat.
translations.がたくさんあって、音楽が聴けて、あとはこれでポテチがあれば完璧なんだけど。図書室: If only I had some chips to go with all this music. But no eating in the library, ugh.
translations.チの図書室って、秋の間ずっと「秋の読書週間」やってるよね。もう週間じゃないじゃん: Our library's been doing 'Autumn Reading Week' all fall. It's not even a week anymore!
translations.書室にコタツ欲しい、▲凛▲専用のやつ。一応、▲主人公＊▲にも使わせてあげるけど: I wish we had a kotatsu in the library, just for ▲Rinko▲. I guess I’ll let ▲主人公＊▲ use it too.
translations.書の秋とかいうけど、冬の方が部屋にこもって本読むイメージじゃんね。なんとなく: They say it's the season for reading, but doesn't winter feel more like the time to cozy up with a book?
translations.月の推薦図書、珍しく面白かった。どうせヒマだろうから、読んでみたら？: The recommended books this month were surprisingly good. Since you’re probably bored, why not give them a read?
translations.凛▲もさ、もっと可愛くすべきだと思うの。別におかしな本読んだからじゃないよ: I think ▲Rinko▲ should be cuter sometimes. Not because of the weird books she reads or anything.
translations.凛▲もさ、たま～には勤労精神を発揮するわけ。えらいっしょ: Sometimes ▲Rinko▲ shows her hardworking side. Isn’t that impressive?
translations.に囲まれる生活。これで授業がなければね。: Living surrounded by books... if only there were no classes.
translations.はよ[32]珍しくスッキリ起きた。: Morning! I actually woke up feeling refreshed for once.
translations.～頭ボサボサ。直さないと。: My hair's a mess... I need to fix it.
translations.ー[24]って感じの朝だね。: It feels like one of those lazy mornings.
translations.…昼まで寝てたい気分。: I just wanna sleep until noon.
translations.りあえず今日は……読みかけの本を読む。: For now, I’ll read the book I started.
translations.ごはんは、ポテチでいいや。春限定のやつ。: I'll just have chips for dinner. The spring limited ones.
translations.あ～▲主人公＊▲は朝から元気だねえ。: Aww, ▲主人公＊▲ is so energetic this morning.
translations.ャワーあびて目を覚まそう。: Gonna take a shower to wake up.
translations.ずらしくスパっと起きた。おはよ。: I actually woke up pretty fast. Morning!
translations.団から出られない……とりあえずオハヨ。: Can't get out of bed... Anyway, good morning.
translations.むさむさむ！▲主人公＊▲暖めに来て。: Cuddle me! ▲主人公＊▲, come warm me up.
translations.…やっぱりもう1回寝ようかな……。: ...maybe I should just sleep a bit more...
translations.凛▲もそろそろ寝ようかな。: I think I should sleep soon too.
translations.ょうど1冊読み終わったところだったしね。: I just finished a book, anyway.
translations.ょうど▲主人公＊▲にメール書きかけてたとこだった。: I was just about to write you an email.
translations.あ、まぶたが……重い……。: Ugh, my eyelids... feel so heavy...
translations.日に点数を付けるとしたら何点くらい？: If you had to rate today, what score would you give it?
translations.の休みは一緒にあそぼ。: Let's hang out on my day off.
translations.朝はたっぷり寝たから朝まで起きてても……でも眠いわ。: I slept in this morning, so I could stay up all night... but I'm still sleepy.
translations.日は快と遊んで、なんか疲れた。: I played with Takane today and I'm kinda tired.
translations.はすでに布団の中にいるのさ。: I'm already snuggled up in bed.
translations.団てさ、見るだけで眠くなるよね。: Just looking at blankets makes me sleepy.
translations.になると結構涼しくて助かる。: It's nice and cool now that it's fall.
translations.は夜が短いから、そろそろ寝ようかな。: Nights are short, so I guess I should get to bed soon.
translations.に寒くなる夜もあるからさ、お腹出して寝ないように。: It can get chilly at night, so don't sleep with your belly exposed.
translations.は眠いよねえ、年中眠いけどさ。: I'm so sleepy, but honestly, I'm always sleepy.
translations.ょっとウトウトしてた。さぶっ？: I was dozing off a bit. Cold, huh?
translations.あ～布団の暖かさがたまんない。: Ahh, I can't get enough of how warm my blanket is.
translations.夜は▲主人公＊▲の夢、見れるかな？: I wonder if I'll dream about you tonight, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.業中のメールはほどほどに。: Try not to check your email too much during work.
translations.▲主人公＊▲もさ、こんなに暑いけど、▲凛▲とくっついて寝たい？そんなまさかね: Hey ▲主人公＊▲, it’s super hot, but do you wanna cuddle with me? No way, right?
translations.コンビニ行きたいんだけど、さすがにこの時間じゃ怒られるか。子供は損だね、ほんと: I wanna go to the convenience store, but I’d probably get in trouble at this hour. Kids really miss out, huh?
translations.やっぱり夜食はポテチに限るね。うずしお味ならモアベター: Late-night snacks gotta be chips. If they're salt and vinegar, even better!
translations.別にお願いじゃないんだけどさ、寒いときは、あっためてほしいんだよ: Not that I'm asking or anything, but when it’s cold, I kinda want you to warm me up.
translations.▲主人公＊▲も一人で部屋にいるときってさ、やっぱ▲凛▲のこと考えたりする？: When you're alone in your room, do you think about me, ▲主人公＊▲?
translations.▲主人公＊▲の夢に出てあげよっか？: Wanna come into your dreams tonight?
translations.コンビニと▲主人公＊▲が居ればいい。と思う: I just need a convenience store and you, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.凛▲のカード、貸出冊数の上限きちゃったから、勝手に▲主人公＊▲のカード使わせても: I hit the limit on borrowing Rinko's card, so I’m gonna use yours, okay? Thanks!

translations.痴ですか、じゃあなぐさめてあげよう。よちよち。: Feeling down, huh? Let me cheer you up. There, there.
translations.んか無理してる？: Are you pushing yourself too hard?
translations.んなときはドーピング。栄養ドリンクをガブ飲みしてみ。: When that happens, just boost yourself. Try chugging an energy drink.
translations.るしかないよ。寝る子は元気！: You just gotta sleep it off. Rested kids are happy!
translations.ールはいいから、お風呂入って寝ちゃいなさい！: Forget the work, just take a bath and get some sleep!
translations.まにはのんびりするのも大事。寝ちゃえ！: Sometimes you just need to relax. Go ahead and sleep!
translations.れてるだけなら大丈夫。すぐ回復するって。: If you’re just feeling a bit off, it’s okay. You’ll bounce back fast.
translations.凛▲も疲れてるけど、▲主人公＊▲のメールでちょっと元気出たよ。: I’m tired too, but your message cheered me up a bit, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.れるのは良いことだよ。……たぶん。: Feeling tired is a good sign. ...I think.
translations.れはガンバった証拠だからね。: It just means you’ve been working hard.
translations.ートまでにはパワー全開にして、遊びまくろうよ[32]: Let’s be full power by the weekend and have a blast!
translations.気があれば何でも出来る！って、偉い人が言ってた。: If you’re motivated, you can do anything! That’s what wise people say.
translations.んか手伝うことある？マッサージしてあげよっか？: Need help with anything? I can give you a massage!
translations.れてるのにメールありがと[32]元気になったら▲凛▲とデートしようよ[32]: Thanks for the message even when you’re feeling down. Once you’re better, let’s go on a date, ▲凛▲!
translations.凛▲が肩もんであげようか？: Want me to give your shoulders a rub?
translations.いんだら、疲れなんて一晩寝れば吹き飛ぶよ。そしたらデートしよ[32]: If you just sleep it off, you’ll feel great in the morning. Then let’s date!
translations.復魔法をかけてあげよう。はぴかむりんくる～♪ひーりんぐしゃわ～～～[32]: I’ll cast a recovery spell for you. Happy healing~♪ Healing shower~~♪
